dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I sense the mark of my Lord Ares on you, love. He's poorly understood among the gods, yet surely you can see fair qualities in him, and me?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The sullen Artemis reached out to you, did she? Oh, that's adorable, dearest! Just don't make any sudden movements with her, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've met Athena, dearest, so you know not all the ladies on Olympus are alike. And I, for one, am grateful to our forebears for that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, did sorrowful old Demeter get all the way to you before I did? She stubbornly refuses me when I offer to help! Unlike you, little godling!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You are so fortunate to have received the Boon of Dionysus prior to my own! He, the most noble and important of us all, the god of wine, himself!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Erm, dearest? If my perfectly developed senses are correct, then you appear to be quite smitten with a little gorgon that you've met down there...? Why that must be adorable, if rather strange!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, something's changed about the beating of your heart, dearest! Oh, it's the little gorgon, isn't it. You Underworld dwellers and your complicated feelings! I can never get enough. My blessings to the both of you, then, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, you have my Eternal Rose, don't you? I am so very touched that you'd think first of me among my mighty kin. It pleases me to know I'm in your thoughts!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Little godling, you must know the seven types of love by now, don't you? It's quite a complicated field, though several types intrigue me most of all. In fact, why, I have several types of love for you, right here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Dearest, why... I sense your heart is very full, indeed! You positively emanate with love. You must have grown quite close to many dear to you. Perhaps so you may do the same with me...? I'm so delighted to have seen your spirit shine.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, my, dearest! I have to say, your heart is positively bursting with such love for so many you have come to care about! Your dearest friends, your burning passions, family, everyone! Why, you're like a living testament to my entire body of work!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I sense you finally acted on your pent-up passion for the Fury Megaera, yes, little godling? These types of things, they don't escape my notice, and they're always so enjoyable to see!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: How's fearsome Megaera the Fury treating you of late, hmm, dearest? I know her type so very well, indeed. She acts as though there's nothing that can get under her skin, isn't that right?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: OK, I think I'm ready. In the name of Hades! Olympus, this is an official message! And I hope it finds you well, Lady Aphrodite!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, this is something, dearest! Such an enigmatic message you have sent. How positively captivating; I must know what it says. It bears the marks of others on Olympus, so... perhaps we ought to share some common knowledge on the subject, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Something has stirred within your heart, dearest! Oh, I can always tell! A certain kind of love, for family? Yes, that must be it, I think! What could have transpired with you, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: That oaf Poseidon spoke to you already, didn't he? All bluster, muscles, and bravado, that one. I'm glad you're not the type.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Mmm, so my heart tells me that you've developed quite the bond with moody Thanatos, haven't you, there? I always figured that his brooding quality was just an act!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Little godling, would that I knew every last detail of how you and Thanatos are getting on of late! The notorious incarnate of death, and the newly discovered son of Hades, fraternizing? It's positively scandalous I think!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Lord Zeus has made acquaintances with you? Oh I sometimes forget that he's your uncle! His favor's well worth having, I assure you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I cannot help but wonder, dearest, why Lord Hades would have kept your mere existence hidden from us all this time. Perhaps he knew that, once you met us, you would stop at nothing to come seek us out!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I must be a mess, let's see here. Hi there! In the name of Hades! Olympus, I accept this message.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why hello, hello, there, little godling. I have to say you're quite the specimen, and so, I've decided I shall aid you for the moment. You interested?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lady Aphrodite, I am truly blessed simply to have made your acquaintance, so, this is for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Lasting relationships are built on reciprocity. So if you lavish me with gifts, why, what am I to do but give you something in return?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: My lady Aphrodite, if not for our acquaintance, I am certain that my days or nights would be much drearier indeed.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, dearest, such a wonderfully thoughtful gift, for me? I love it, and I would be lying if I said you shouldn't have!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lady Aphrodite, I'm afraid there really isn't much here worthy of you, but perhaps this can suffice.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My, but if this isn't such a treasure to behold, and I accept it as a sign of your affection! Of something even more, perhaps...?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dear Aphrodite, surely you have all the offerings you can stand, but I would ask that you accept one more.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, dearest, but it stirs my heart to know you care so deeply for our wonderful relationship! To celebrate it with such princely gifts!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Dear Aphrodite, the incomparable beauty of Olympus is less difficult to fathom, having already met you. I am so grateful to have earned your favor.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My, but don't you come on rather strong, there, little godling! Though, I can take much more of your affections, you shall see!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Aphrodite, you must have more worshipers and suitors than all your kin upon Olympus combined. I may not fall exactly into either category, though I hope you know my gratitude for all you've done for me is true.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, dearest, I am more worshiped than perhaps anybody else upon Olympus! You'd think getting such praise would roll right off my back by now, but no! I love receiving it. Especially from you.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: My lady Aphrodite, once more you've graced me with your presence and your favor, which inspire the best from me. Let this modest gift of Ambrosia signify I'm forever in your debt.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My little godling. I'd say you've honored me more times than I could count, but that would be a lie, now, wouldn't it. I so admire your devotion and your perseverance! If ever you do reach us on Olympus, I should very much enjoy getting to know you even better, then.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My dearest little godling, how fares everything with you of late? I love to have these little interactions with you, simple as they are, for they have brightened many of my evenings here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I have been waiting for a special moment to confess my great appreciation for your deeds... this moment's special enough, isn't it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My loveliest of blessings is reserved only for those who've earned my deepest adoration. So, congratulations, love! And here you go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Sometimes, our hearts become so full that they could burst! If only you could see how much I care. I would do anything to aid you in your plight! My heartfelt blessings be with you, dearest.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Little godling, you must know that the heart has infinite capacity for empathy. And I so feel for you there, that I have mustered for you some of the most beautiful of blessings I can offer!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Looks like we meet again, dearest, here among the foul detritus of the boatman's wares! You truly take me to the best of places!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: At first I didn't know how to get through to that odd river-boatman, Charon. Turns out he lusts for coin, and now I understand him well!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You spent your hard-earned wealth on my account, dearest? Why if that isn't just the sweetest thing!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: One cannot put a price on love, but on my blessings, from the boatman, for my dearest? I'd say we're settled up.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, look at you, you poor, poor thing, you're hurt! Though, let me see if I can make it better.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Tsk, you're in no condition for an outing with me, dearest. Though, perhaps you might recover from your hardships with my aid?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Dearest, why, your heart rate's fluctuating wildly! Has it really been that bad up to this point? I'll try to help however much I can.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you're just in an awful situation, aren't you. Yet, I can tell your proud heart keeps on beating, for the moment anyway! Don't die just yet!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, little godling, you're about to die! Why, none of us want that, because if so, you won't get to enjoy my blessings here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's say we kissed and made up, dearest. Just, do not anger me again, or I might come down and kill you there myself!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Alas that passion sometimes drives me into vengeance, dearest! Yet, who among us isn't without vices, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, how I hate to fight with you like this! Let's forgive each other and forget, go back to how things used to be?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm not angry with you any longer, dearest! Though, might I suggest you take some extra steps to keep it that way, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: A loving heart is a forgiving heart, don't you agree? So I shall let this little matter slide, and you've my loving heart to thank for it, hm-hm!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The truth is I'm a lover, not a fighter, dearest. So how about we call this matter put to bed, and get on with our lives?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd say this little squabble can be put to bed, for now. I'm better for the moment, but I was very angry with you, love!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I cannot bring myself to stay upset with you forever, little godling, so let's move along from that small misunderstanding there.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: There is no common sense with love, godling, so... why don't we pretend your indiscretion there did not occur.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: It is through times of difficulty that the love we share is tested and reforged. But you just watch yourself when testing it like that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Love and jealousy go hand in hand, don't they, dearest? Although the former's much more pleasant, isn't it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, all this fighting! It's just not like us at all, dearest! Let's say we kissed and then made up, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Did you miss me, little godling, hm? I thought I'd steal away a bit and that together we might make up for lost time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Hello again, there, little godling, let's get to it, hm? I want what you want; there's no further need for words.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, boo, looks like you've rather got yourself into a bind, there, haven't you. Though, not to worry, dearest. I can pull some strings.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: There, there, dearest, you'll tell me all your troubles just as soon as you arrive, so let's just get you out of there for now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: What is it, love, are you still having problems with the dead? I swear, you'd think they had enough of me in life!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: What did I miss since last time, anything of interest, hm? You'll have to fill me in once you break free, dearest.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, look at you, there, love! So well-prepared to take on any danger that may come! But, I must wonder, are you well-prepared for this?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ready yourself, dearest, because you and I? We're going to have ourselves a little outing I expect that neither one of us shall soon forget.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Would you by any chance have room, there, in your heart for a most-gentle blessing from a goddess such as me?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't lose heart, now, little godling! I won't have you giving up before you get to see me in the flesh among the gardens of Olympus here...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Dearest, I've known many gods and godlings through the ages. And, I have to say, you're quite intriguing, even for our kind.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, dearest, I suspect we'll have ourselves a most exciting time together, you and I! Just do your best and it'll all be fine!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I am always here, or close enough, to help you through whatever troubles you may face, my little godling. So do not hesitate to call upon me, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd ask you show me a good time, there, love, although I almost can't imagine a good time where you reside! So dreary, constantly!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I missed you terribly, my little godling! All that I ask is that you do not die on me again, why, I don't think that I can take it anymore!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: How you must yearn to reach the surface, little godling! It likewise stirs in me a yearning to assist you, by all means at my disposal!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: No need to worry any longer, dearest! I bring you strength and comfort, and I shall be watching every step of yours most carefully.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, how I long to see you face-to-face! Until such time, however, this old means of keeping touch shall have to do. So you take care, now, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You know I would do anything to have you here among us, don't you, love? Oh, I just hope my blessings are enough...!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Love tends to blossom in the strangest places at the strangest times, you know that, don't you, dearest? All one can do is entertain the chance.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't work yourself too hard down there, you promise, little godling? We need you in good shape and spirits on Olympus here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: What do you say we skip the chat and get right to it, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, would you look at whom I found, all by his lonely self.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's see what mischief we can make, between the two of us!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You want my blessings, dearest, here they are!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I hope I didn't keep you waiting very long, did I?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Even immortal hearts can break, my little godling.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: What do you say we go and make new friends together, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You seem like you could use a helping hand, there, love.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The bond of love is strong enough to suffer any hardship, dearest.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Times of adversity make love grow even stronger, little godling.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I hate to see you struggling, dearest! Please do be careful, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Love conquers everything, you see that, don't you, dearest?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Think of all those you love, and may they spur your courage, little godling.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Your passion to achieve your goal is quite inspiring, I have to say!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: It's such a pity I can barely see you in that awful darkness, little godling.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Love spurs the heart to greater acts of valor, doesn't it, dearest?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Take heart, now, little godling. And how about you take this from me, as well.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd love to help you however best I'm able, my little godling.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I have the loveliest selection of my blessings for you this time, dearest!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I think I'll give you something very special this time, little godling.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Is not the purest act of love to aid somebody in their time of need?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm feeling wonderful of late, dearest, so here, enjoy the benefits!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, dearest, you've no idea what a delightful time I had while visiting you recently! So many new sights and sounds and smells, why, it was wonderful! And you are burdened with a big responsibility, aren't you? Mind if I lend my graces to you still from time to time...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: To think your father and that sweet Persephone, they were together down there, all along! I was so certain that your father's heart was cold. That's just the thing with love, dearest! That, sometimes, it surprises even me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You're going to love it on Olympus, little godling. The air is beautiful and brisk, the gardens lush, the feasting plentiful...! Why, it must be the opposite of everything to which you are accustomed!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: What shall we do here once you finally arrive? Perhaps we could go out and meet some mortals! I know all too many maidens and/or noble gentlemen who'd absolutely love to get to know you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: How I love to have these unexpected little run-ins with you, love! You are just so spontaneous, and I've a liking for that sort of thing!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Keep following that heart of yours, dearest! It's good enough a guide, believe you me. Mine tells me you are going to succeed!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You do know that I'm married, don't you, love...? I'd forgive you if you didn't, for my husband, he's always... busy with his work. I'm grateful that you're there for me to talk to.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: And here I was beginning to think that we had something special going, no...? Look here, little godling, let me save you lots of future suffering: I happen to be the jealous type.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You'd best not take for granted my affection, godling. Yes, I've lots of it to go around; but I can just as easily rescind such privileges.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: They say a lot of things about me, dearest; and they'll tell you, in your dealings with me, ample caution is in order. Let me show you why.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't ever take me for some thoughtless nymph to be manipulated, dearest. I expect reciprocal devotion from you. Do you understand?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, really? You shall find I don't take such rejections lying down. And you shall find it out the hard way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: If it's your wish to test the limits of the fine relationship we've built, why then... I can confirm you're testing them, all right!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, dearest... surely there's no way that could have been one of the wiser choices that you've lately made?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Dearest, just in case it hasn't been made clear as crystal lately, let me tell you: When presented with the opportunity, don't ever reject me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You'd spurn my love this easily, dearest? You are about to find the consequences are much harder to dismiss without a second thought.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I must admit I'm unaccustomed to rejection, love. But you must be accustomed to swift death! Here comes one for you now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, but this is such a heartbreak, dearest! Why would you do that? You know that I won't take this lying down.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You dare to play with my heart, little godling? I'll just take yours, and shatter it to pieces, then, I think!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Sometimes I think that you're quite different than most all the others here, darling. And then, you go and do something like this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You think you can brush me aside like that? Well, I think I can crush you into tiny, little bits! Let's see who's right, shall we?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh what is going on down there, dearest? I thought for certain you would make it out, but seems that nasty place has kept you grounded, hasn't it. But don't despair, and you take heart, won't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: A little bird once told me that the shade of the great hero called Achilles now resides within your father's residence, dearest? I always wished to meet with him someday...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You met Achilles after all, godling. He was quite instrumental in a war of my design. Still, he resisted my attempts to sway his actions. You tell him, simply, I admire him.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The great hero Achilles, he continues to ignore my polite outreach, doesn't he? Why, I've attempted to reach out at least several times! Your father's realm is really quite a lot. How terribly frustrating it must be!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You've had a brush with Megaera, the Fury, haven't you? Oh I know a thing or two about that one. Though, lately we Olympians no longer mingle with those living in the Underworld. You're the only exception!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: A little birdy told me recently that you and Megaera the Fury, why, you've grown quite close! Now do be careful around her, and, try not to get attached, there, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: I think for many of us, dearest, it can come as a surprise to learn that love and war often go hand in hand. Opposite forces, yet this connects them, doesn't it. The fiercest passions of gods and mortals! Isn't that right, Lord Ares?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Mortals are so bent on clinging to their lives, that many among them would gladly kill for it. The surge of emotion which they feel... one passion is no different from another, Lady Aphrodite, dear.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh dearest! I have brought you keen-eyed Artemis, who, in her focus on the hunt, has not developed social graces suitable enough to come to you herself!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Social graces, she says! Going about like that! I'm sure you know that I can find you when it's necessary, Zagreus. Though, how to get away from Aphrodite, I have no idea.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: You must forgive us, little godling, meaning our extended family here upon Olympus! Some of us are terribly stuck up, and must be making matters much more complicated than they have to be.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Athena_01
dialogueLines.text: I wonder, dearest Aphrodite, whether you'd be willing to repeat such things directly to my countenance?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you must know full well that I would do much more than that directly to your countenance, Athena dear! Quite frankly, you could use a lot of work!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Dearest, you must know, Goddess Athena and myself, we don't always share a common view, perhaps because she overthinks things constantly, while my heart leads me on!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Athena_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm glad we understand each other, then. It would be most embarrassing to be caught bickering amongst ourselves in front of Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The venerable goddess of the seasons, Demeter, chooses to look as stately as can be, can you believe it, dearest? Although, why one would mark so many fine lines upon their face, I wouldn't know.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Demeter_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, Aphrodite, dear... you wouldn't know a thing of substance if it offered you a cloak. Your chosen countenance makes plain the full extent of your intentions, and your interests alike.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: My powers, dearest, oft go hand-in-hand with those of Dionysus, with his power to persuade the mind to find such beauty where it isn't, really!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dionysus_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, haha, no need to flatter me like that, there, Lady Aphrodite! Beauty's almost entirely within the mind, I'm sure! And in the muscles and the jawline and the winning smile and, well, who am I to tell you, yeah?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: The thing to know about this family, dearest, is that, each of us, we have our little quirks. Although, we always stick together and our love for one another perseveres!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, hoh! What do we have here, little Hades? Seems to me that you have company! Well, I'll just leave the two of you alone. My lips are sealed tighter than a warship hull!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, feel free to stay, Poseidon! I was just explaining what an idiot you are, though you're able to articulate this best! Anyway, dearest, what was I on about...?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Dearest, your lord uncle wishes to address you from our mountaintop, although I had assured him that the two of us, we had everything well under control!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Come now, Zagreus, the only thing Lady Aphrodite has under control is her long list of salivating suitors, am I right? Aphrodite, how about you bestow your blessing and be off, and I'll take it from here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Mm, I see you have the Lady Aphrodite's blessing there already. Love and death, together, hand in hand? Sounds most agreeable to me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: So Artemis, my lonely half-sister, got to you first? She merely helps you hunt, whilst I shall help you kill. Observe.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, that blade of yours... it looks as though it could relieve a mortal of his head with ease. Excalibur, is it? I've studied all the Fates' designs, and this one is among my favorites.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You bear the blessing of Athena, yes? She would protect you from your enemies, whilst I would rather that you slay them, and be done.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Is that the fire-eating shield of the great warrior Beowulf, which you have there? I knew the Fates had plans for it, but I did not expect for you to be a part!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I faintly sense the mark of Goddess Demeter upon you, hm? Her power over plentitude is opposite to mine in some respects. But, lately, she has channeled it in manners more agreeable to me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: That drunkard Dionysus cannot help you near as much as I, my hell-born kin. Compare the gift he gave to what I offer you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Those are the gauntlets of the fated king Gilgamesh, are they not? A bringer of destruction, and an agent of the Fates. You are full of surprises, my kin!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, I believe that is the Frost Fair Blade you bear! I understand it shall become the instrument of choice of yet another god of war, someday. I long to meet him, this fellow student of death.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, you bear your own father's blessing, my kin? Such a surprise... I know the two of you are now in league, and yet... I am still quite accustomed to the thought that you harbor war-like hatred for one another. Perhaps there's still a trace of that, though, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Our messenger Hermes has been in contact with you by now, yes? Perhaps you shall not see him very often, for my work keeps him rather preoccupied, shepherding souls and such.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, you bear the Blood-filled Vial which I granted you! The mortal's blood contained therein... I drew it myself! Too seldom am I able to become directly involved in such matters.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You bear the warring instrument of one called Lucifer, I see. I've little to go on about him, but it is clear he knows a thing or two about destruction, is it not?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: How is your mother Nyx of late, my kin? Have you yet given to her my regards? For I should think that Night and War would share a common ground.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: How is Nyx of late, my kin? Have you yet given to her my regards? For I should think that Night and War would share a common ground.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Do tell your mother Night Herself that I am often thinking of her here, although we haven't met. She must believe that there are those upon Olympus who admire her.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Do tell Night Herself that I am often thinking of her here. She must believe that there are those upon Olympus who admire her.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Perhaps once all of this is over, my good kin, you might arrange 'twixt myself and your dark mother, Nyx, some sort of chance to meet? Do think upon it, and declare to her my interest if you please.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Perhaps once all of this is over, my good kin, you might arrange 'twixt myself and the goddess Nyx some sort of chance to meet? Do think upon it, and declare to her my interest if you please.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Your mother Nyx and I, we have begun a correspondence, my good kin. I do appreciate you putting us in touch. She is a lovely specimen, if you don't mind my saying so, perhaps?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The goddess Nyx and I, we have begun a correspondence, my good kin. I do appreciate you putting us in touch. She is a lovely specimen, if you don't mind my saying so, perhaps?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You shall be pleased to hear that your own mother Nyx and I, why, we intend to meet. I'm quite excited to exchange ideas in the flesh.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You shall be pleased to hear that Nyx and I, why, we intend to meet. I'm quite excited to exchange ideas in the flesh.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Please send your mother Nyx my warm regards, won't you, my kin? Would that the others on Olympus knew and understood your kind as I now do.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Please send the goddess Nyx my warm regards, won't you, my kin? Would that the others on Olympus knew and understood your kind as I now do.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Would that I knew the goddess Nyx, myself, my kin! So many of my wars are waged by night. I am most grateful, and I wish her well.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Here goes, then. In the name of Hades! Olympus, this is an official message! Lord Ares, please consider our proposal... once you're able to decipher it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: My, what is this, my kin? Some sort of invitation for me, I presume. Not just for me... this symbolizes all the others, here? Most intriguing. I shall investigate the meaning of this as quickly as I'm able, then. But first!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The blessing of your uncle Lord Poseidon might have helped you to this point, but here: My gift shall see you further still.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The fated bow Sharanga, in your grasp! That is not a form I'd expected you to wield. You have exquisite taste in weaponry, my kin!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Perhaps you know a god called Thanatos? The two of us are very close associates, you know. Do give him my best wishes, should you see him soon.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I trust that Thanatos is doing well? Although he brings to mortals merciful release, whilst I most certainly do no such thing, I do appreciate his take on it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: It is my understanding that you have grown rather close with Thanatos, my kin? A perfect choice of mate; though I confess I'd not expected Death to have affection for another save himself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Surely you've heard rumblings about a war which has erupted on the surface, here? Doubtless you've seen an influx of fallen mortals. It's quite a decent one, I have to say! Though, unlikely to rise to the ranks of the greats. Too few armies involved in it, I fear.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: War's such a wondrous thing, my kin. It solves so many different problems, whilst perpetuating its own inevitability. Let's keep it up, then, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Do you ever think to yourself that you were born a bit too late, my kin? For my part, I wish that I could have been there myself when my father and the others waged ferocious war against the Titans. Ah, it must have been a sight!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I sense that you have forged a greater bond with your instruments of destruction there, my kin. Then that is very good. And may their altered forms serve you quite well.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Lord Zeus has gotten to you first, I see? My father's gifts are generous, indeed, though... I think I can help in my own way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Know that I admire your Lord Father very much. For his grim work lets me continue mine. I trust that one day you shall settle your dispute.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: This one was bound to show up I guess. In the name of Hades! Olympus! I accept this message.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You've got quite the fighting spirit in you there, I have to say. Most intriguing, and yet no surprise for someone born in hell itself. You come on out of there, and tell me all about it. I'm a fellow student of death, you see.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Ares, please accept this offering, for giving me such strength as necessary to succeed.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You are a flatterer, my death-inflicting kin. And I am feeling generous, as well, so here! A small token for you of my affection.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Ares, I honor you for all the strength you've given me to overcome my foes.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Such a splendid offering, to me! How very thoughtful, there, my kin. I am taken aback, though I accept!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Ares! Please accept this token of my deep appreciation for your generous support.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: An offering, for me? Indeed! How gracious that you keep me in your thoughts. Know that, likewise, I keep you in mine.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Ares, it is my privilege to have met you, and have learned your death-inflicting way.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I do appreciate this gift to me, although you really shouldn't have! The suffering which you inflict is ample compensation in itself.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You have shown me nothing but respect and granted me your favor repeatedly, Lord Ares. This is the least that I can do, in kind.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Most often when I'm given offerings, it is with wishes that I lend my favor in a coming war. Yet from you, my kin, I sense no such motive. I'm quite taken aback by that, I must admit.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Ares! As bloodshed has become somewhat of a necessity in my situation, I am very grateful that you're with me in this. I know never to take it for granted.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You're most gracious with me, my kin; and I remain enthralled as ever by your blood-soaked way of life. I trust the violence I have wrought on your behalf has been quite satisfactory?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I offer this Ambrosia in your name and honor, Lord Ares. To the god of war! How many foes have I vanquished with your aid and guidance? But more than that, I'm pleased to know you, and to be your cousin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, such an exquisite gift this is, indeed. Yet, the destruction you have sown, the sheer carnage... nothing can surpass that, I should think. Should you ever go to war, my kin... genuinely go to war, I mean... do look me up. I imagine I would take your side.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You bear Varatha, the Eternal Spear...! I thought it lost! Have you any idea how many lives it drank during your father's glory days?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, you wield Coronacht, the Heart-Seeker. It pierced three Titans in one shot back in the war amongst our kind. Please do take care of it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You have the Shield of Chaos, Aegis... quite unlike the one my good sister Athena likes to flash around. You have much better taste.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, you are wielding Exagryph, the Rail of Adamant! A most fascinating device. Imagine the new face of war, should its secrets someday be revealed, and spread to mortalkind!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Well if it isn't Malphon, the Twin Fists, bound to your very capable hands! So many weapons are so indirect, I think. With Malphon, you are about as close to the destruction as can be.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Did you happen to know, my kin, that you have slain more than a hundred foes since you began your quest? You have! For I am keeping count. And I am most impressed.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You are a most impressive death-dealer, my kin. For by my estimation, you have slain at least a thousand souls down there! Souls mostly having died before, but still.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I know that you have many aspirations, my good kin. To be plain with you about my own motive for a moment: As long as you continue bringing swift and steady death, you shall have my unyielding support.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The more you slay your enemies, my kin, the stronger the bond between us, I think. Can you not feel it, too? Though, perhaps your lust for blood overpowers your other senses, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ten thousand souls have fallen to you, now, my hellborn kin. I am rather beside myself, I must admit. Fine work.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The greatest wars require great alliances, my kin. And so, I shall entrust to you some of the greatest methods of destruction I've devised thus far.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The winds of war blow fiercely on the surface now, my kin. Thus I am able to confer upon you even greater power than has been my custom.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I knew that foul boatman would come through, and you would find amongst his wares this gift!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I give to you this token of respect, buried though it must have been within the boatman's hoard.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I trust the river-boatman Charon has been keeping plenty busy lately thanks to me?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The boatman Charon ought invest into a boat of more substantial size if he's to keep up with my work, my kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Your boatman there is a reliable deliverer of death, it seems. And that makes three of us, I think.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You seem to be upon the verge of death, my kin. I cannot wait to hear of it! The experience of death, time after time! You are one of a kind!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, my kin, but you have suffered terribly to come this far. No matter, for we soon shall pay your enemies in kind.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: So much letting of blood, so much of it, your own. Let's see to keeping you alive and in the fight a while longer, then.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You're on the verge of yet another brush with death, I see, my hell-born kin. Do send some others down with you, would you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: A mortal surely would have already succumbed to injuries such as the ones you've suffered, there. Impressive how you carry on, like that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: A sacrifice in blood is fully paid, and we are squared away. Though think you twice next time before you cross me, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Well haven't you withstood my murderous intent! Resilience as this deserves reward, and I am feeling rather generous.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: It is not often I attempt to kill someone and they survive. Bravo! Our score is settled up for now, so let us carry on as friends.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You capably survived my wrath, and I commend you for it. Let us continue on, as friends and kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I think that we are squared away, for now. Though, do not test my patience further, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You crossed the fields of death impressively back there. Though, you are fortunate I'm in a giving mood.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: When blood is spilled and death is dealt, I simply cannot remain discontented for too long.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: What I could see of that display of violence you just sowed was thoroughly commendable, my kin. Then, here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Your sacrifice to me just now has moved me to forgiveness for the time; thus shall we call a truce.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: A war can only last so long, my kin. This one is not worth the pursuit, I think, when we can wage a greater one, together.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, after a show of violence such as that, how can I possibly remain upset, my kin?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Your slight against me is already forgotten; for I was more than pleased to witness such a monstrous show of force.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I must say you deal death rather exquisitely. Though, perhaps I could be of some further assistance in such matters, yes?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah! I figured that you must have been the source of all that bloodshed underneath the earth. Let me see if I can make your death-dealing a little more efficient.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, my hell-born kin, my blessing now is yours to do with as you wish; provided you inflict a little suffering for me?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I've just the thing for you this time, my kin. May I present my instruments of pain?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I surely hope your bloodshed's going well, and long that there shall be no end to it. I am, as ever, here to serve your benefit.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: How fares your endless war against the dead? Let it be known that I am happy to take sides in such affairs. Please, I insist!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Death rears its head in all too many forms, I'm sure you know. Though you may never find them all, I nonetheless encourage you to try.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The wretched dead you face perhaps forget themselves. Go, then, remind them of the agony which brought them to your realm.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Life and death are inextricable, and war is often what connects the two. Don't you agree?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: This world has a limitless capacity for pain; and so, it truly is no inconvenience to help you to bring out a little more.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The living and the dead alike desire what I represent. Their appetite for bloodshed cannot easily be sated. A goal to strive for, no?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Perhaps the dead you stand against have long forgotten the experience of anguish and despair. I trust that you shall soon remind them for me?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Beautiful, isn't it? The strife which follows you. You have a real knack for this, and I for one am happy to assist.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Some would question the destruction which you sow, but I shall never do so. I fully understand your impulses. Allow me to indulge them.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Not once has your Lord Father thanked me for delivering vast portions of his clientele. Surely you shall be more grateful for my gifts.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Do you suppose the dead feel pain unlike the living? This is for me an endless fascination, so go on, and give me more to think about.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: As you continue waging war against the dead, I gladly lend you my support; family to family, no questions asked.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: It is a veritable crime your father distances himself from all the rest of us. It is fortunate that you yourself are not so disagreeable.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Let us together deal some death, shall we?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Shall we continue our campaign against the dead?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: What do you say we bring the dead some pain, for old time's sake?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The devastation you have caused has not escaped my notice!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: We stand before a golden opportunity, to inflict pain. Let us proceed!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: There is no problem war cannot sort out.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah there you are, my kin! I have a gift to aid your bloody work.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: My blessing be with you, and may death follow in your wake.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Please spread some suffering down there for me, my kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I shall empower you to acts of greater violence than before.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: War needn't carry out solely above the earth, my kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I trust that the destruction which you sow is going well?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The recent devastation which you caused, that was impressive work.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Whenever you bring death, why, you've my full support.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: How fares the ceaseless slaying of your foes, quite well, my kin?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Perhaps my blessing shall let you deliver death still more efficiently.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Your father's realm shall be quite full, I think, once you and I are through.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The finest instruments of death at my disposal shall be yours.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd like to offer you a choice amongst my most exquisite tools which inflict suffering.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: What say we start our next war with a special flair, my kin?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I've not seen ample blood spilled recently, so let's please make up for lost time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I was quite pleased to hear again from Nyx of late, my kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: May the wondrous goddess Nyx continue to watch over you, and darken the eyes of your foes.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: To think you have the goddess Nyx's aid, as well as mine!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: There are so many types of death... and yet, the sudden, violent kind is unsurpassed, I think.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I am quite eager to commence jointly killing your enemies, my kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: What do you say we start another of our famous killing sprees, my kin?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: It's not been long since last I saw bloodshed... but far too long for me, nevertheless.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: My finest implements of death I now avail to you, my worthy kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Let us make this blood-letting truly one to remember, then, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: May you sow such destruction as to shake this mountain to its core, my kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I shall now give to you the means to wreak such havoc there, my kin!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I wish to tell you once again I had a splendid time during our recent shared festivities, my kin. At last, I've finally seen your death-filled realm firsthand! I learned a great deal. And I look forward to learning more from our successful collaboration, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, my kin, I had misunderstood that Nyx was your mother. But, Persephone? I never took her for the sort to have an interest in your realm. Alas that we never had opportunity to discuss the subject here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Your good mother, Persephone... dread Queen of the Underworld! I certainly misjudged her when we had occasion to interact whilst she resided on Olympus. Perhaps I, too, should consider a life there in your realm...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You are the son of Night herself, they say? A fascinating character, ill-liked upon Olympus, although I myself have always longed to meet her.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, my favorite Underworld death-dealer. I so look forward to the pain you shall inflict this time around.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Would that a sudden scourge of war would help you out of your predicament. Why, I would stir one up for you without a second thought.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, my closest kin in all the Underworld, I see you there, I think! What sort of violence shall we sow together this time, you and I?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: There's so much insufferable talk of peace up here, my kin. It is quite the relief to focus on much more important things, with you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You must know I often hunger for destruction, almost uncontrollably at that. Though I am finding you are able to sate that appetite of mine.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: May all the death you bring become the stuff of legends told in fearful mortal whisperings around the world, my kin.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You reject my generous offering of aid? Hahahaha, you must not know me very well. Death shall come, regardless, either to your enemies, or you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You would deny such aid as I would offer you? How rather disappointing. You've more to learn about the art of dealing death, it seems.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: An incorrect decision, there, my kin, to side against me thus. Blood needs be shed, and yours is going to suffice.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: It seems unwise of you to thus dismiss my offering. Suffer, then, a while by my hand.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Your choice leaves much to be desired here, my kin. My temper I shall keep in check, but only barely so.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: A disappointing choice, my kin, and there are consequences to such choices, every single time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Your course of action here was ill-advised, my kin. For war shall come to you no matter what, as I shall presently reveal.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The whims of our kind are unpredictable, my kin. But you shall find responses to such acts to be the definition of consistency.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I'll not abide such disregard of our past companionship, my kin. In war, one must take sides, and you had best choose mine.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: War shall be waged here, no matter what, my kin. But even still, I am dismayed you would have sided against me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You wish to have a taste of what a war against me would be like? Well, then, I shall oblige.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Did I detect some hesitancy on your part just then? Perhaps you knew that you were making a mistake. No matter; you'll learn now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You shall not goad me into anger with a petty insult such as this, you know. Nevertheless, there is a price which must be paid for it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Recently, there was a burst of violence on the surface, near to where you are, but higher up. 'Twas altogether odd, but must have forced you to return once more. No matter; time is on our side.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I sense so much death at the gates of your father's realm, of late, my kin. Now, I know that seems perfectly ordinary on the face of it, except... there's something more. I wonder if you know the reason why...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I know your efforts to come here have repeatedly been thwarted, my good kin. However, we have caused such violence in the intervening time, that we must take this as a real victory. Let us continue for however long it takes.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You traveled rather far down there since last we met, my kin. And that means you have dealt incalculable death. I must commend you thus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, my kin! I sensed fresh bloodshed from you recently, the real kind! For you have slain the living near the surface, have you not? Mere vermin, yes, but good enough for me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I so anticipate the day you finally arrive upon Olympus. There are few amongst us here with interests such as those I think we share.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: There are at least a few of us who share such interests here, isn't that so, Lord Ares? As for you, dearest, you take all the time you need!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Wars waged over love, my kin... can you imagine that? The lady Aphrodite and I can endlessly discuss such circumstances. I trust, from time to time, you stop to ask yourself how come you choose to fight. Not that you need a reason, of course.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, Lord Ares, truly there isn't the need to cloud our little godling's thoughts and judgment with such comments, is there, hm? Let's give him what he wants, and we can carry on in private, about that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: I wished only to speak to you in private once again, my kin, except, you see...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Athena_01
dialogueLines.text: ...Except you see, dear Cousin, that some members of our family are predisposed toward the unspeakable. I caution you around my half-brother, is all. Now carry on.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: You interrupt me once again, dear sister. You know I do not care for that. I warn you to stay out of my affairs. I shall aid my kin as I see fit.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Athena_01
dialogueLines.text: You only do as you see fit, Lord Ares. Mind that you continue pulling in the same direction as us all.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: The cold of death is quite becoming of the Goddess Demeter, do you not think so, my death-dealing kin? She is becoming well accustomed to it, too.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Demeter_01
dialogueLines.text: I think that you forget yourself, Lord Ares, sir. For I am much your elder; my famines had already slain the mortals by the tens of thousands by the time such thoughts of doing so first crossed your mind.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, my kin! I was just inquiring with Lord Dionysus here, under which circumstances are the greatest mortal feasts of all prepared? Because I have a certain hunch, regarding that...

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Dionysus_01
dialogueLines.text: Yeah, yeah, Ares, I will hand it to you, man. There's nothing like a feast after a war, all right! Provided you're on the surviving side, that is! Otherwise I guess they'll be feasting with you down there, Zag!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, my hellborn kin, I have to say that there are times I wish I could have been acquainted with your father somewhat more, if you'll forgive my saying so. My father and my uncle, here... they're predisposed quite differently than I.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Perhaps if you were not so odd, and made more effort to be somewhat more approachable, Ares, then we'd have more in common, you and I! Should you need any tips on that, why, you just let me know!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, that can't possibly be the spear once wielded by the great Achilles, there, can it?! The shape is unmistakable, I mean, have you even the slightest just how many mortals got completely slaughtered by that thing? Oh, it has seen some use!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: So Aphrodite reached you first, did she? Sounds exactly like something she'd do. She has a knack for trouble. So, let's just stay focused, here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You're pretty close with Ares, aren't you? And here they said it couldn't be done. If I were you I'd watch myself with him.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You met Athena earlier, I guess? I'd never trade my bow for all that pomp and armor, but... I guess to each her own.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Have to admit, you're very capable with Coronacht. Now I can hit a bull's eye in my sleep, but you'll be right there with me if I don't keep practicing I think!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Not everybody on Olympus is a total disappointment, Zagreus. Why, someday maybe you could meet Callisto, she goes hunting with me all the time! Bet you don't see many woodland nymphs down there.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey Zagreus, that Nectar you sent? Callisto and the nymphs and I, we popped it open recently, and it was really good! Had us positively frolicking about. So, thanks!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You must have a friend or two, don't you? It's hard being alone all of the time. At least I have Callisto and the other nymphs, and... I have you! A distant friend is still a friend, isn't that right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hope you don't mind, I told Callisto all about you recently! Don't worry, I was quite discreet about it, the two of us were on the hunt, not like I just shouted out your story from the mountaintops!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Zagreus, if only you could turn yourself into a woodland creature and just fly or burrow out of there! My Callisto, she can turn into a bear, you ever seen those? Monstrous, furry things, quite huggable, if they don't kill you first!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You've never even seen the woods, have you? I hope you do, someday. You could meet Callisto and the others! It's quite beautiful, and green, and calm, it's... anyway.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't know what it is about you, Zagreus, but I feel like I can be me with you, you know? Maybe it's that you don't constantly talk over me like everybody else, besides Callisto and the nymphs I guess. Not that I can even hear you, but, you know what I mean, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: That's not the Coronacht I know, isn't that... Chiron the centaur's bow? So that was Coronacht, as well? Seems every decent bow was just a version of that thing! Except for mine, of course.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: So even Demeter's become involved in this! Didn't think she would. Though you'll be glad she did! Provided you stay on her warm and fuzzy side, of course. Working on that, myself!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: That lush and lecher, Dionysus, counts you as a friend? I'm hoping that there must be some mistake, yeah, Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: When did you get your hands on Malphon, the Twin Fists? Hands in, I ought to say! I heard that one time, Demeter, she smacked her father right square in the face with those! Bet you can probably relate.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, look at you, with Exagryph, the Rail of Adamant! Seems much too noisy-complicated as a hunting weapon when you could just use a nice quiet bow, but hey, to each her own.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Say, that's the bow Stepmother Hera herself once wielded, isn't it? Her aspect of Coronacht! I'd know it from the... frankly rather sinister skulls all over it. It's very Hera, trust me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You seem particularly light on your feet, there, Zagreus. I'd figure Hermes, himself, was speeding you along, except I've not seen him about in... been a while, really.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, that's my Adamant Arrowhead on you! Normally, it's for killing things, but in your case it makes it even easier for me to hunt you down, even in the dark. Now that I found you... here!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Found you, Huntress, here. In the name of Hades! Olympus, this is an official message! Especially for you, Lady Artemis!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Some kind of special message for me...! Oh, looks like there's one for everybody on Olympus, then. Felt rather special for a moment, there! And now you're making me check in with all the others. Great!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Uncle Poseidon blessed you, didn't he. To think that big, fat oaf is your own father's brother. I'm told to be respectful near him, but it's hard.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Um, Zagreus, did you attempt to chat with Coronacht just yet? Remember, tell the bow I see you drawn in the arms of the seventh avatar! Something good's supposed to happen if you do, some divine archer-person's aspect I should think? You going to try it soon, or not?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, look at that! The message must have worked! Practically can see that shiny bow from here! I've never wielded Coronacht myself, at least not yet. Though if the Fates are sending visions to me of its past or future bearers, why, I guess I'm bound to get my shot eventually!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, that's the Eternal Spear, Varatha, isn't it? Your father used to use that, didn't he. A bit ornate for hunting, but a spear's a spear, is what I like to say!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Say, were you hunting vermin near the surface lately, Zagreus? That's practically just like the real thing! It must have been a thrill!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You've become a right accomplished vermin hunter, Zagreus! Maybe you'll get to use those skills against worthier creatures soon enough.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Your name, it means 'great hunter', Zagreus! I guess your mother Nyx must have expected someday that you'd pick up a few pointers from myself!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, good old Father Zeus, he must have blessed you with his lightning bolts, did he? Always looking out for everyone.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Something's troubled me a little, about you. You fight so desperately. At first I thought you simply lacked in patience. But now I see it's urgency that drives you. What is it that you're after, really...?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: There's only one heavenly archer I know of. Well, several, really. Anyway! In the name of Hades! Olympus? I accept this message.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I heard about you. Look, I'm not like all the others on Olympus. The power of the hunt helps keep me company, so... maybe it'll help you, too!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lady Artemis, I hope that you'll accept this offering, for all your kindness and support.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey thank you for this, really. And, I've just the thing to offer in return. It's just a gift, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: My lady Artemis! This is nothing, next to all your grace and favor.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey wait, this is an offering, for me? I, oh, that's very kind, though, let's get back to hunting, now, OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lady Artemis! I am indebted to you, for the strength and cunning you have given me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Look, Zagreus, I don't know what to say, except for... thanks!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: My lady Artemis, your favor's been invaluable to me. No finer huntress ever walked the surface of the earth, or underneath.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You're being very nice to me, and that makes me suspicious, understand? So, you want more of that... you keep this up.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: At the risk of incurring your wrath, Lady Artemis, I hope you will accept this from me, and see that my gratitude for all you have done for me is genuine.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: What do you know, another gift of Nectar, that's... quite thoughtful of you, Zagreus! Normally don't care much for the stuff, but, every now and then, I mean... why not?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: In your honor, Lady Artemis! Your mighty blessings have helped me through so many trials now, and I always welcome your level-headed presence here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Look, I like being worshiped just as much as anybody, Zagreus, though bear in mind that you can always leave the worship of me to the forest nymphs, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I know you have no shortage of Ambrosia on Olympus, Lady Artemis, but I imagine it's less often that the stuff go all the way from there to here, and back. What can I say? You make me proud to be a member of this family.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I never felt like I could be myself with everybody on this mountaintop, you know? So much posturing, and bickering, and... I just head out to the woods most of the time. Maybe you understand me better than the rest, I've no idea still. But I appreciate you've made attempts to try.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, how'd you get your hands on a nice bow like that? You take good care of Coronacht for me, so I can try it too once you're up here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I think you might enjoy it on Olympus, there's... a lot of feasting here, I guess, and the air is cool and crisp, and it's much brighter than it is down there. Sounds like a dream, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I hope that once you make it to Olympus we'll go hunting sometime, you and I, you know? I like being on my own and all, but it's been nice, talking to you like this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I grow so tired of the others here, you know? Much rather be out with the woodland nymphs than with these gods upon this mountaintop. You must know what it's like.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, get ready for this, Zagreus, because I seldom share the greatest of my hunting secrets like I am about to.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, no need to keep on toying with your prey. Here comes one of my finest blessings, now!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I don't reveal my greatest hunting techniques for just anybody, Zagreus, so you better appreciate what you're about to get, and use it to go far!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: How about we not take any chances this time, Zagreus? So here, this is the best I've got. You better not waste it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, one thing I'll say for Charon there? He doesn't talk too much. And since neither do you, I'm letting you have this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I guess this means you must have paid the boatman's ransom here, and whatever price he charged you, it was worth it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Even there in your Underworld, it seems quality hunting gear doesn't come cheap, apparently!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: If you're quite done with shopping, Zagreus, what say we cut straight to the chase from here?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You hunted down a real bargain there in Charon's shop, though how about we try a slightly bigger deal on for size right now?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you all right there, Zagreus? Wouldn't do to have you die on me just moments after meeting here like this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh! Look at you, you're hurt there pretty bad, but, just stay focused on the hunt, and it'll help to keep the pain at bay.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Look, I'm just goddess of the hunt, not medicine, so... I don't know if this is going to help right now, but, here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Your hunt has evidently not been going very well so far, I see. Though, maybe we can still turn it around.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, one good thing about all of the blood you've lost is it was even easier to track you down this time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Fine, I'm not angry anymore, not really anyway, but you just watch yourself with me, you got it?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh you're still there I see. Well then, all right, let's call it even for the moment and get on with this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, all right, I'm going to forgive you now I guess, no need to beg, you just think twice next time OK?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Got to say you handled yourself pretty well back there. I can't stay mad after a show like that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Good hunting just now, Zagreus. You passed my little test, so now we're good, just like it never happened.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: So you survived, so what. Here, why not take a Boon, and then be off?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I will admit mistakes were made back there, so you just don't make them again, next time all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You know what, I decided not to kill you, Zagreus. No sport in cornered prey, so here, get on with it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Good thing you're nowhere near our mountaintop or I'd have shot you for that stunt, myself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, Zagreus, it turns out you need all the help that you can get, so here's a pity Boon for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: I could keep hunting you until you're dead, but there's too little meat on you to make it worth my while.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey. You're not alone. You're not alone down there, OK? Here, let me show you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: The dead must make a rather easy target, wouldn't you say? Let's see what you can do to them, given your choice of these.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: You busy, Zagreus? Thought maybe I could interest you in some of these old hunting tricks of mine.
