dialogueLines.text: Boss, I know you've heard a certain rumor from a very skinny individual who's uninclined to move. You best keep that one to yourself, all right? Or else our jig is up, and your father wouldn't like that, nor would you. So, cheers!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Say, you're in good with what's-his-name, the one who gave you his lucky tooth? So he's an all-right sort, then. Has to be, if you put up with him!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Once took a skinny little chap down to the Underworld, got the business end of a sharp spear, he did! He had it coming, though, a lot of lying, cheating, and the like. Last that I heard, he's still making his amends down there. Eh!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You're pretty close with Thanatos, aren't you, boss? We don't often run in the same lanes, though our duties sometimes intersect a bit. Odd chap. Seems good at what he does, though!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Saw Thanatos again lately, here, boss, and want to tell you, almost looked as though he cracked a smile when he mentioned you! Never seen anything like that with him!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hah! Can't help but notice you've been timing yourself, boss! Good habit that. Keep an eye on the time, you'll get faster and faster! Not as fast as me, mind.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, Coz, since you're timing yourself, case you haven't noticed, doesn't count against you when we stop to have these chats! Insisted on that little rule myself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you stopped timing yourself, boss, everything all right? If that's not a cry for help, well, I don't know what is. Um, here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Good, boss, I can see you're clocking yourself once again. Little term I like to use, means beating yourself up whilst keeping time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Look, Coz, if you aren't always going to time yourself, that is a choice of lifestyle I have to respect. And learn to understand.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Whoa, what's gotten into all those lifeless wretches that you're always fighting with down there? They're really moving lately! Whatever's made them go all out, it wasn't me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You heard already from my pop, haven't you, Coz? Wonderful guy. Don't get to spend a lot of time together, though! You know how that is. Well, see you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, Coz, my pop never gives his lightning blessings to me! He's quite invested in what happens to you, isn't he?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Whoa, what's good, there, Coz? Though, who am I kidding, we can cut the small talk. I don't mind. I interrupt my brothers and my sisters all the time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Boss, you've probably caught yourself thinking: Hermes sure is quick! So how come it took so long for him to show up in the first place? Well, I'm afraid that's not for you to know. But! It's not because I was late. Not late for anything.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, uh, could you do a little favor for me, Coz? My brothers, sisters, family, and whatnot, they're unaware I'm working with you, here. It's no big deal, but let's keep it that way for now. All right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Happened to be in the area, boss! Seeing as the mortal folk up here keep dying off, and someone's got to bring their souls to your domain, now, don't they.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Know that saying 'don't be hasty', boss? That comes from me. I swear! A little way to stave off competition, masquerading as the wisdom of a sage. Those stupid mortals will buy anything!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Not that I really know exactly what you're up to, Coz, but! If I did, I don't think anybody on Olympus is aware of it. Or, if they are, they're keeping their mouths shut. The same as me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You ever wonder how I got this fast, Coz? Lots of practicing, I'll tell you that! And being born unnaturally quick, I guess!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, uh, so I kind of placed a bet with the old boatman, my associate that is, that you could beat him in a fight, twice in a row! No pressure, or anything, but just in case you prove me right one of these days, I would appreciate it, Coz!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You did it, Coz! And by it I'm referring to the act of beating down my seemingly invincible boatman associate, who fancies himself pretty tough as Underworld deities go! He wasn't sure you had it in you, and if I may be so bold, neither was I!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Aphrodite said she's running just a little late, Coz, though I'm sure you understand. Besides, I'm here! In spirit anyhow.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Soon as I heard you were looking to see Ares, boss, I got here as fast as I could! He's never going to beat me. Much less in all that armor.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Wanted to let you know my sister Artemis is out looking for you. You should be running into her in any chamber, now!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Expecting someone else, there, boss? A certain half-sister of mine perchance? Well, tough break, I got here first. Want one of these, or not?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: That chill you were expecting in the air, that wasn't Demeter this time, here, boss! No, that was just me whisking to you in a flash. Makes for a little pleasant breeze I think!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Afraid that Dionysus couldn't be here for you, boss. Though punctuality has never been one of his stronger suits.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Afraid your regularly scheduled Olympian could not be here right now, because I'm that much faster, boss!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You might have been expecting someone else, here, boss. But I just couldn't help beating them to the punch this time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Got here just as quickly as I could, Coz. Which turns out to be quite a bit faster than my relatives!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm sure that keepsake that you brought will come in handy soon enough, there, boss!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: My relatives are normally quite quick to heed the call of anybody bearing one of their keepsakes! Huh!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I may not be the god you're looking for right at the moment, boss, but I will get you on your way to them in no time here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Here to tell you that Poseidon's on his way, boss. Sometimes he is a little slow. But you'll meet up with him again eventually!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Sorry, boss, my pop had pressing matters to attend to. But I'm here! Relaying you that message, and relaying this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Got here as quickly as I could, boss. Now what say we get you promptly the hell out of there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey Coz, gathered you were just about to make another go of breaking out of there! Thought I'd stop by and give you a boost.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You're raring for your next trek out of there, right, boss? Well then I guess I got here just in time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Heard you were heading out again, boss. Changed my schedule around a bit, not a big deal, and figured I'd drop in!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You're off again, are you? All right well then safe travels! Or swift travels, failing that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You ready for another go at this, Coz? Well then think I can speed you on your journey there.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: This mark, almost like a bat wing. In the name of Hades! Olympus! I accept this message.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey boss, found you, good. Hermes, at your service. Pleasure! You are the talk of Olympus! Normally I wouldn't get mixed up, but for you, I will be making an exception. Now, come on, we both got places to be!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Another message from Olympus, boss. This goes, 'Zagreus, take absolutely all the time you need making your way to us; we know the going must be treacherous, and we assure you our support, however long it takes.' Well, how about that!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hermes, please accept this gift as a small token of my appreciation. Thank you for always keeping me on my toes.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh! Mighty keen of you to leave a tip, there, boss. And I've a tip for you: Don't be slow! Maybe this will help with that.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hermes, please accept this gift as a small token of my appreciation. Thank you for always keeping me on my toes.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hermes sir, you've asked for nothing in return, and so, please take this humble offering, because... it's nothing, really!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Well now, that's awful kind, there, Coz! No need to thank me, though. Not so profusely anyhow!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Hermes sir, you've asked for nothing in return, and so, please take this humble offering, because... it's nothing, really!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hermes, my friend? May I call you my friend? I hope this modest offering will lift your spirits but won't slow you down.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I look like I got the sort of time to sip Nectar, Coz? Well, guess what, I do! So, cheers!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Hermes, my friend? May I call you my friend? I hope this modest offering will lift your spirits but won't slow you down.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Ever since we met, Lord Hermes, life here in the Underworld has been much faster-paced, and I am ever grateful. This is for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, boss, I appreciate the tip. But just as a reminder, all my services are paid in full already! No need for special thanks. Though... cheers.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Ever since we met, Lord Hermes, life here in the Underworld has been much faster-paced, and I am ever grateful. This is for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I never could have come this far this quickly had it not been for your tireless support, Lord Hermes, sir. I'm in your debt.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, Coz, I got to say I had a few concerns when we first met, your father being who he is and all. But you're all right!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I never could have come this far this quickly had it not been for your tireless support, Lord Hermes, sir. I'm in your debt.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: This one's for you, swift and sure-footed messenger of the gods! You make what you do look easy. But I know you're going out of your way. Thank you so much, Hermes.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: My rule is not to let things get too personal as far as work-related matters are concerned, Coz. But you're family! And, well, you're a right decent chap, I think. Offering up a bit of Nectar to me in the middle of all this!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: This one's for you, swift and sure-footed messenger of the gods! You make what you do look easy. But I know you're going out of your way. Thank you so much, Hermes.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I salute you, Lord Hermes, with this rarest of delicacies! Pretty rare here, anyway. You never show it, but I can only imagine how hard you must be working to back me up. Cheers, mate!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, the last time anybody offered me Ambrosia from the Underworld was never, before now! That's quite a gesture on your part. You could have just as well taken my services for granted and I'd not have minded in the least! But, thank you, Coz.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I salute you, Lord Hermes, with this rarest of delicacies! Pretty rare here, anyway. You never show it, but I can only imagine how hard you must be working to back me up. Cheers, mate!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Message for you, Lord Hermes! It says, 'This offering is dedicated to the incomparable god of swiftness, from whom the news is always good, because he's bringing it. You are a real mate, you know that? I really owe you one.' Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Look, Coz, I am going to accept this choice Ambrosia from you one last time, all right? But from this point, I am doubling down on all professional responsibilities, here. Strictly business between us! Although, secretly, you're one of my best mates. Want you to know.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Message for you, Lord Hermes! It says, This offering is dedicated to the incomparable god of swiftness, from whom the news is always good, because he's bringing it. You are a real mate, you know that? I really owe you one. Zagreus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, you ready for this, boss? Got you the Premium Express this time. Absolute cream of the crop right here! You're going to go real far.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Guess what, Coz? It's the Premium Express, delivered straight to you, fresh from the richest mountaintop up here! You're going to like this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Express-delivered message for you, Coz. It says: 'Congratulations! You're my hundredth customer today.' And here is what you get!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, hello, Coz! Odd that we're running into one another here! Among the wares of my professional associate, I mean. Must be some sort of clerical mistake!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, hello, boss! Odd that we're running into one another here! Among the wares of my professional associate, I mean. Must be some sort of clerical mistake!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You're well familiar with my professional associate, there, with the boat? Souls of the recently departed got to make it over to the Underworld somehow. Part of my job! I bring them in, he takes them down.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I guess I'm used to these one-sided chats here, boss, thanks to my work experience with my professional associate down there! You tell him I said hi, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: A word of caution, Coz. Don't ask too many questions about me, or my professional associate down there. I hand souls over to him, and that's it, you understand?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Wouldn't you know it, boss! I was just minding my own business, handing off a few dearly departed souls to my professional associate, and who shows up, but you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: My heavy-breathing professional associate was gracious enough to drop me off here with his other stuff, and for quite an affordable price, at that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, then, let's go make that spend of hard-earned coin well worth your while! What do you think, Coz?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd tell you not to ask too many questions of my good professional associate nearby, but then, who are we kidding, boss? Not like he'd answer you those questions anyhow!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Message for you, boss, from my professional associate, who wanted you to know, and I quote, 'Hhhrrrrnnnngggggghhhhhh.'

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Been working with my good professional associate, the boatman there, since I-don't-know-how-long. Though, let me tell you, Coz, we haven't had a job quite like this yet!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Among the many ways in which you could parlay your earnings into better chances of survival here, I'm flattered you would think of me this time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: How strange of a coincidence that you keep running into me along the riverside like this, don't you agree, there, Coz?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't normally go selling off my blessings to the highest bidder, boss, but your bid there is good enough for me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Eugh, I have to tell you, you look awful, Coz. You're barely holding on! Let's see if we can't perk you right back up.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Whew! Looks like times hit you hard since last we had a run-in, Coz. Well, when life is tough, just hurry through the rubbish bits, I say!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Whoa you're a hot mess, there, Coz, what happened getting here? Ah well, I hope your travels run a little smoother here on out.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: There's a fine line between being quick and being hasty, boss. And if you're hurt as bad as I think, I think you might be on the hasty side!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, good news is you got to me, but I can tell you hit a lot of bad news on the way! You stay alive, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Oof! What happened getting here, boss? Let me guess, you got whipped, burned, beat up with spectral clubs... something like that?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You're looking worse for wear, I hate to tell you, boss. But, we can pick you up and get you going here, I think!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, boss, just between us? Out of all special delivery recipients I've had over the ages, here, I've got to say, you're the most interesting one!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Message from Olympus for you, boss! It says, 'It sure is nice up here upon this mountain, not having to escape the Underworld! Come join us soon, won't you?'

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Message for you, boss. It says, 'You're rather slow. If only somebody could help you out with that.' Huh, fancy that, what a coincidence!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Got you a message, Coz. Says here, ahem: 'Hurry up and get out of there already.' It's from the surface of the earth, says so right here.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Another message here! It says, 'One small spoon dried oregano, two spoons extra virgin olive oil, one large onion, minced, a dash of salt to taste,' wait, this isn't for you. Though you should try it sometime if you ever make it out!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Message for you, Coz, it says, 'On behalf of all Olympus, we would like for you to know that was a right good bottle of Ambrosia that you offered to the god of travel, Hermes, who appreciated every drop.' Sincerely, me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Another message for you, Coz, this one says, 'Hey, mate! If you ever do make it up here up on this mountaintop for whatever reason, we should hang out, all right? I can show you around.'  Your friend, Hermes.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, Coz, here's the goods, fresh from our mountaintop. Take all the time you need deciding! If you want to be a slowpoke.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Won't need but a moment of your time, here, boss! And you'll more than make up for it right quick, you got my guarantee!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, Coz, express delivery to where-in-blazes are you at right now? Anyway take one of these, and go about your business!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I know you're kind of in a hurry, boss. But let me show you what a real hurry's all about in just a moment here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Package for you, boss! And I think you know what's inside. Well, maybe not exactly, but... just pick something, will you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Come on, Coz, you can do this! And furthermore, I think you can do this rather quick! Now go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: It's you, boss, that's good! But you're standing still! That's bad. Let's get you up and moving about again, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, boss! Not much to report up here. But I've not exactly come this far to bring you news, have I?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Afraid there's no one faster than myself, here, Coz. But good news is, you are about to close the gap a little bit!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Slow day so far, there, boss? Well all of that's about to change, you got my guarantee!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: How 'bout we pick the pace up just a little, Coz? Or maybe by a lot! Whatever you've the mood and stomach for right now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Last thing I ever want to do is slow you down, boss. So, enough chit-chat. Now pick and go. Go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You've got a ways to go yet, boss. Good news is, the slowest part of this particular trip is hereby over... now!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: All's well enough here on the surface, Coz. Though, sooner you can make it out of there, the better it'll be!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Another go up to the surface, boss? Might suggest that you be very quick about it. And might give you this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's hustle, shall we, boss? Honestly, I don't know how the rest of you can stand it, trudging about like you don't have someplace to be!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hiya, boss! I'd ask what's new, but I already know! I have my ways. And you have to get right on out of there.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Wish I could just fly in and haul you out of there, Coz, but there's some rules even I can't break. Though nice to see you have a go of it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I come with urgent tidings, boss! Unfortunately not addressed to you. But someone got you these!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Sorry, Coz, no messages this time. Guess that's what happens when your whole existence is kept secret from the world!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Come on, now, boss, let's get you moving here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Got here in practically no time at all, boss. Ready now?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey Coz, package for you here. Knock yourself out!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Got a customary care package for you, Coz.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, what's it going to be this time, boss?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Come on, Coz, let's pick up the pace a bit!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Go get yourself out of there in a hurry, Coz.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: No rush, but go on and pick one of these, boss.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Message for you, Coz: It says 'Take one, it's free, enjoy!'

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: What's going on, there, boss? Are things all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You want the usual, or what, there, boss?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Special delivery and all that, boss! Here, take your pick.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey boss! You take one of these, and go for it.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Just so happened to be in the area, here, boss!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Making sure you got this, Coz. You got this, Coz!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Here comes a little boost to get you up and out of there in no time, boss!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, don't just stand there, Coz, pick one of these and go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Your quickness is my number one priority, here, boss.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: No time to waste and so on, Coz. Now, choose!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Caught wind you need my services here, boss?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Thought I'd check in, Coz. See how things are going. Slow, right? Not for long.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Ready to hustle? Good! I'll take that as a yes.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's get you quickly on your way, there, Coz!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Message for you, boss. It says: 'Here, choose one of these, and go!'

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Another message for you! This one says: 'Hey boss! Take this!'

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Just thought I'd check up on you, boss, and bring you this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hope you enjoyed the life of being slow, because all that's about to change, right here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, boss, here, let's get you on your way!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Past time we got you out of there, right, boss?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Just thought I'd drop by, give you this, and go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: We'll have you racing out of here in no time, Coz!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: How goes it underground of late, there, boss?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Nice day we're having on the surface! You should see it, boss!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Another day, another race up to the top! You ready, boss?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, here we go again! Let's go, then, boss!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: There's not much new worth mentioning up here, though looks like you have got your hands full down there, boss!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You've got a tough climb up ahead, Coz, so you just pace yourself, all right? Just kidding, go as quickly as you can. It works for me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I heard a certain someone's back at home with you down there now, Coz! I'd call it wonderful news, except it isn't news, at least not yet! Though if the time comes that you want to spread the word, just give the signal here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I heard a certain someone's back at home with you down there now, Coz! I'd call it wonderful news, except it isn't news, at least not yet! Though if the time comes that you want to spread the word, just give the signal here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: So you get to keep breaking out of there, time after time, so that your father can keep finding ways to make it even harder to escape? Something like that? Sounds like an interesting assignment, Coz!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Got to tell you, Coz, that was a real something of a feast back your place! A little awkward, having to pretend we just met, but hey, I'm an Olympian! Means I can posture with the best of them. Good times, Coz! Glad it all worked out.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Everybody on Olympus, they're still going on about Persephone, Queen of the Underworld! They had no idea she was down there all along, none whatsoever, Coz! And as for me, now I can deliver you my blessings more officially, I think!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Even though everything's out in the open, now, and all my brothers, sisters, and whatnot are going to keep helping you fight your way out of there, I've still been keeping to myself, of late! That way nobody slows me down.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Some members of the family up here, I know they haven't helped at all, but just don't take it personal or anything, all right? Think of it this way: You've got more of us getting along and talking properly than I have ever seen!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Well look at you, Coz! Rushing to victory after successive victory. Caught wind of your accomplishments down there! Well then, let's keep the streak alive!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Heard the news you broke your streak of victories of late, boss. Happens, right? You seem the sort to bounce right back, though. Let me help with that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Heard you got through pretty quick last time! Not bad, not bad!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You'd think that once you break free to the surface we could see you from Olympus a bit more than usual, but no! It's like you're shrouded in eternal night up here, hm? Something like that. Odd, right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you beat your fastest time fighting through all of that! Not that I'm keeping track! I'm keeping track.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey Coz, that last run-through that you did, I almost can't believe how quick you pulled that off! You're really pretty good!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, you got out of there in practically no time at all before! Let's see if you can have another go like that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You're getting faster, Coz, keep at it, just like that! Can always go a little faster than before is what I always say!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, Coz, looks to me you beat your fastest time climbing up out of there! That's nicely done! Can you go faster still?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: What do you know, you beat your personal best time escaping recently! I hope my blessing helped a bit with that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, Coz, all this time that I've been bussing souls across the borders of your father's land, it's good to have the chance to help somebody out the other way!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: What's going on, there, Coz? Can I call you Coz? Got something here for you should make your battles to the death end that much quicker!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hey, Coz, you're now well accustomed to our little chats, but I want you to level with me here. You're the boss, if you prefer, I would be happy to shut up, no harm no foul. Just give the signal, hey?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Mute Hermes next time? (He won't mind.)

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Now that you mention it, Lord Hermes, yes, let's keep our interactions nice and quick.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I hear you, boss, we'll cut straight to the chase next time, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Perish the thought, Lord Hermes. It's been great hearing from you from time to time.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, all right, boss. Just making sure that I'm not interrupting anything!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahem! Pardon the interruption, boss. You let me know if you prefer that I pipe up again next time, more like I used to!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Keep muting Hermes? (He won't ask again.)

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Appreciate you checking in, Lord Hermes. I think we should keep at it like we have been, nice and quiet.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: No problem whatsoever, boss. Just checking in.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I miss hearing from you, Hermes. Let's carry on like we did before.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hah, sure thing, boss. It's good to have a chat from time to time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Thought I'd check in again real quick, there, boss. You want my witty conversation next time, or straight to the Boons?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Keep muting Hermes? (He won't ask again.)

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Thought I'd check in again real quick, there, boss. You want my witty conversation next time, or straight to the Boons?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Mute Hermes next time? (He won't mind.)

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Straight to the Boons, Lord Hermes. We both appreciate cutting straight to the chase.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I get it, boss. Words are too slow, aren't they. Won't bother you again word-wise, but I'll be seeing you!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Definitely witty conversation, Lord Hermes. Boons are more than welcome after that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hah! Good, I like these little chats! Take care, now, boss.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Straight to the Boons, Lord Hermes. We both appreciate cutting straight to the chase.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: I get it, boss. Words are too slow, aren't they. Won't bother you again word-wise, but I'll be seeing you!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: You know, yes, let's go back to having witty conversation from you, Hermes. That sounds great.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Hermes_01
dialogueLines.text: Hah, good! I like these little chats! Take care, now, boss.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh-hoh, so you've already heard from Aphrodite, have you, Nephew? Understandable, but first things first, now let me add a little something to all that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hoy, Nephew! It's my understanding you've been blessed already by one of my other nephews, Ares! As you can see, not all of us are cut from the same cloth; and thank the Fates for that!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I sense that you've been marked by the elusive Artemis, correct, Nephew? She shies away from most of us, so if she's taken somewhat of a liking to you, great!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You bear some sort of splendid-looking weapon, there, Nephew! Must be another aspect of fair Stygius, my old discarded blade! Never did see that one myself, but, I saw many others that were splendid, too!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, you've received a blessing from Athena there already, little Hades! So careful all the time, that one, but here, I'll help you live a little, just in case!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, little Hades, there's a certain chill about you, meaning you received an ice-cold blessing courtesy of Elder Goddess Demeter, correct? Now, personally, I think water's best in liquid form, but who am I to judge?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Whenever Dionysus calls a feast, I'm turning up sooner or later, hear me, Nephew? So make room for one more blessing, and, let's go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, Nephew, you've procured the Rod of Fishing, I detect! Fine handiwork if I say so myself! Its line is nigh-invisible and causes denizens of my domain to flock to it like mortals to temples of mine! Good fortune with that thing!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm told a number of the underwater denizens from my domain were captured fair-and-square through your surpassing skill using the Rod of Fishing, little Hades!! They're yours, I've millions more!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: All these river denizens you've caught, little Hades... it can only mean we share a deep connection, don't you think? I, with my power over the entire vastness of the seas! And you, with the power to ensnare a hapless fish with but a flick of the wrist!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Huh! Why, if my eyes do not deceive me through those murky depths, you brandish Malphon! Let me tell you, little Hades, those old gloves have done some dirty work before your time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Say, what exactly is that very mighty-looking spear I think I faintly see in your possession there, it's... why, I've not seen a thing like that except on very distant shores! It's almost as impressive as my trident here! Almost, I say!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Say, is it me, or do you bear your father's ancient spear, Nephew? I always wanted one a bit like that. And now I have one even better. Hah!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Little Hades, it appears that you are moving right along! Almost at an uncanny pace!! I wonder how you got to be so fast! Aquatic exercise?!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew, how is it you're navigating your cruel father's realm at such a blinding speed?! There's only one Olympian who moves that quick! Besides myself! Where is he, anyway?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah-hah! I sense you have in your possession that fine shell I sent to you, a little gift plucked straight out of the sea! You keep it close so I can better track you down!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: All right, here goes. In the name of Hades! Olympus! This is an official message! Uncle Poseidon, hope you can make this out.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: What's this, Nephew? Why, isn't this a note? Or, part of one, addressed to me, but it appears there should be other pieces, for the others here? Ah, it's like a sunken treasure, then! Which means I must seek its mysteries at once!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Your good mother Persephone, she's here all safe and sound, thought you should know, there, little Hades! Shame you can't be here with her, too, but ah! Doubtless we'll someday meet again!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: It's likely, little Hades, that you currently reside just underneath one of my boundless seas! Normally you'd have to be submerged to use this power, but you know what, close enough!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew, why, the seas up here, they're just about as widely feared as your vast Underworld down there! For water can be deadlier than bronze!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: My oceans, they are filled with danger, not just water, little Hades! Many of the dead you face, they met their mortal end at sea, and not on land!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Say, word has reached me that you squared against one known as Theseus, now champion there in Elysium? He was a handful even when he lived! So much so that my honored brother Zeus, he took to calling him my son, can you believe the nerve?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: So, little Hades, doubtless you have seen that we upon Olympus also lend our favor to the mighty Theseus, who bars your passage from Elysium! Now, don't you take it personally, there, because our blessings go to all who deserve them. Although, we try to save the best for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: So, Nephew, my honored brother Zeus already has endowed you with his thunderous might? Well you shall soon forget about all that, after a taste of this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew, your cruel father, Hades, he's my elder brother, you know that? Not exactly the expressive type, and never was. We seldomly saw eye-to-eye on things!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I daresay, little Hades, you've some spunk in you! Why, I think you take after me more than my crusty elder brother! You'll get away from that old codger yet!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: My crusty elder brother Hades must have tried to poison you against us lot! I can imagine it as clear as water, Nephew! I'm proud that you've resisted his undoubtedly most-twisted words!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Last time your father and I spoke, he told me I was all washed up, can you believe the nerve of it, Nephew? Why, he took the words right out of my mouth!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: That scoundrel Theseus! Apparently he earned himself some sort of winsome prize, for all his blustering there in Elysium! Though, I'm quite certain that, no matter what he and his bull friend have at their disposal, you've the power to defeat them, utterly! So go do it, surely I'll get word!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah-haha! I knew that I could count on you, Nephew! So the ungrateful Theseus, the winsome prize he earned was just some chariot, correct? And he was vanquished on it, anyway! That's what he gets! Boasting his prize was greater than any in his mortal days, pah!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: It's uncle number two, it's got to be. Then, in the name of Hades! Olympus, I accept this message.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hoy there, little Hades! You recognize your uncle, do you not? We've a lot of catching up to do, but first things first, you get yourself out of that dour Underworld! As for me, I'll see if I can stir things up a bit to cover your advance!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah-haha-hah, little Hades, I was certain you'd the wherewithal to thin the ranks of the betraying river denizens who fled my surface-seas to your father's domain!! I bid you good fish-hunting forevermore!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Uncle Poseidon, it's been excellent to know you, sir, so, please, this is for you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh I am positively moved by your affection, little Nephew! Though, I think I have just the thing for you, in turn! Here, I shall transfer it to you!!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Uncle Poseidon, this here is for you. Would that my father were as easygoing as yourself.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah-hah! A show of generosity from my most favored nephew! Your gift is mightily appreciated!! I'll just go ahead and add it to the pile.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Mighty Poseidon, greatest of my uncles, arguably, please accept this gift!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: For all the times I'm offered gifts or sacrifices, little Nephew, I still always very much appreciate it! I mean, look! I'm grinning ear to ear!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Uncle Poseidon, I have a special catch for you! Although it pales next to your sheer awesomeness.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Whaaa, now would you look at that! Is that an offering to your most favored uncle, me? You know what, Nephew? I've decided I shall take it! Thanks!!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I salute you, Uncle Poseidon! Your strength and confidence inspire me, and you accepted me as part of the family without question. It means a lot.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, Nephew, but you needn't shower me with offerings and praise, you know! Why, I've no need of showering at all! Not when I've the sea itself, to do with as I please!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Whenever I encounter you, Uncle Poseidon, my spirits lift, and I feel there must not be anything that can stop me. I only wish we met sooner, though I'm grateful to have met you at all.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I thought I told you, Nephew, not to make such offerings to me? Ah, probably forgot! Or getting you mixed up, perhaps, for I have many other nephews, thanks to Zeus! Though, between us, I don't like any one of them as much as you!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Uncle Poseidon, sometimes I wonder what my life would have been like had you been a part of it sooner. Your encouragement, your enthusiasm... it means a lot. To you! This Ambrosia's been to hell and back!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hohhh, but isn't this a kingly offering, indeed, my little Hades! I know how difficult it must have been to get, so distant from Olympus as you are! I'll never understand how come your father's cruel to you, for if you were my son, I would be proud! Proud anyway, but you get the idea.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: My, my, little Hades, you brandish Exagryph, the Rail of Adamant! That weapon's power was so terrifying that we sealed it away. Oh well! Surely its mortal-damning secrets shall be safely guarded in your hands!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, little Hades, it is awful murky where you are, but if I'm not mistaken, and I never am, you wield fearsome Stygius! She once belonged to me, you know! Not quite my type, but we sure had our times! You take good care of her for me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You know I've many vitally important things to do besides lending my aid to you repeatedly, Nephew? But, all of that can wait! Family comes first!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, have I got something for you this time, little Hades! Something special I have saved for when you really proved yourself!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: There's nothing stronger than the sea, Nephew, neither above it nor below!! And, if you are in need of further proof, behold: The greatest of my blessings, just for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah-hah! You found me, little Nephew! Strewn among the inventories of that most disturbing river-boatman! That means you win my blessing!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, well, my plan to get ahold of you via the boatman worked out flawlessly! Harness the might of the sea, then, why don't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, Nephew, I know that salty Charon can be difficult. But I am certain that whatever price you paid, you got a deal!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Nothing comes freely for the mortals on the surface, Nephew! And from the sound of things, it isn't any different with that Charon character!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Let me just say, Nephew, that money-hoarding boatman best be fair with you! Because I'd hate to see anything happen to that little boat of his!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hoh, you look positively in atrocious shape, there, Nephew! What's the matter, one too many run-ins with the wretched dead before I intervened?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Seems to me that you're in dire straits, there, little Hades! Why, you're bleeding everywhere! Here, let me try and do something for that.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, what happened to you, little Hades?! I can tell even from here that you've been beaten like a skiff during a storm!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, don't go dying on me, yet, Nephew! You have to live! Or else the Boon I offer you shall go to waste!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Your hated enemies, they almost got the best of you, I fear! But you can still turn it around, especially now that you have my aid!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, very well then, little Hades! Uncle's going to let you off the hook this time. Just mind your manners next we meet!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I must hand it to you, little Hades! I did not expect that you would weather such a storm! I'm mightily impressed!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, I can't stay angry! Let us call all that unpleasantness back there water under the bridge, what say you, Nephew?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: My, a show of strength like that deserves a commendation I should think! Although, for next time, know my favor's not a thing to trifle with!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, that's quite enough, I take it you have had about enough of that, correct? You're pretty good! So here, why don't you run along!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah-haha, my fits of anger come and go just like the tides, Nephew! Now take this from me, and get out of here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Now that was truly finely fought, indeed, Nephew! And I've a suitable reward here, just for you! Don't even know what I was mad about!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: What can I say, Nephew? Sometimes our tempers get the best of all of us. You're fortunate mine didn't get the best of you back there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You weathered the storm, there, little Hades, and the sea is once again at peace. And you'll make every attempt to keep it that way, correct?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, no need to fight about this any longer, don't you think, Nephew? Here, take my blessing, like you should have in the first place!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Now let's not set a bad example for the family, Nephew! We're better than all that. Besides! They've many bad examples as it is.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: If you should ever make it here, Nephew, know this! I shall be pleased to stand in for the father figure I can tell you never really had. We can engage in all sorts of aquatic competitions, solve riddles, visit the sea-nymphs! Oh, it would be great, wouldn't you think?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hoy, Nephew, it's excellent to see you once again, and in good spirits, still? Then, come, let's make some waves!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahoy, little Hades, it is I! The greatest of your uncles! Here to aid you in your daringest escape attempt! And I do admire your persistence!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Good tidings once again, there, little Nephew!! It is I, returned as ever here to make a splash against your many, many foolish enemies!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahoy, Nephew! I bet you have your hands full dealing with your enemies down there, so let me see what I can do. And I can do a lot!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: It seems you're getting somewhere, little Nephew! Good, but here, allow your favorite Uncle to bestow a little boost!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, hahaha! Found you down there, Nephew! Now let's overwhelm your enemies in a typhoon of godly might, what do you say?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Little Hades, have I ever told you I detest the dead? Well, I admit it, I just cannot stand a mortal past his due. So how about we get you far away from all such filth, agreed?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: What do you say, there, Nephew, ready to get wet, or no? Oh I suspect you are, so let's get to it, and dispense some liquid justice!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: How fares your feud against my crusty elder brother lately, good? Big Hades, he is disagreeable with all of us, not just with you, so, don't you take it personal, and stick with me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Looks like you could use the power of the sea, wouldn't you say so, little Hades? Good thing I'm here, so that together, we might wash your enemies away!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Enough kidding around without me, Nephew! I am here, so let's go bust you out, much like a raging river through a frail little dam!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You're looking somewhat stronger than before, there, little Nephew, but you're much too scrawny still, to be quite blunt. So, here! Let's fatten you right up!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hoy, my nephew! I think I have kept you waiting long enough, so then, let's go! And break our enemies to pieces, like so many ships upon the shoals!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I'll have you know, the power of the seas themselves is yours once more, Nephew! So how about you put it to its rightful purpose, and go smash some stuff!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Are you perchance in need of godlike aid, Nephew? Well, excellent! Because I happen to command the sea, and I shall hereby let you take it for a whirl!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Who dares to mess with little Hades? You simply point me at them, Nephew, and we'll leave them shivering and sopping wet, you'll see!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: At last I found you once again, Nephew! You eating well and getting strong, correct? I'll help you with the latter category in a moment. Here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: The awesome bounty of the sea is yours to do with as you please, Nephew! I've mustered forth a sample, anyway!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hoh, little Hades! I'd heard you were preparing to rain terrible destruction on your enemies! So I got here as quickly as I could! I'm not too late, am I?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: All of us must sail through troubled waters now and then, correct, Nephew? Fortunately, navigation is my speciality, so let's be on our way!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Your victory's most certainly at hand now that I'm here, Nephew! So long as you make sure to take advantage of the absolutely awesome power I bequeath!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, if it isn't the most favored of my nephews, stuck as ever though you may yet be! We'll get you from there, little Hades, don't despair, Uncle Poseidon's here!!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Good tidings, my most favored nephew! All is relatively well, I hope? But hope alone is worthless without action, is it not? So here, let's act together!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Just wait until you see the seas, Nephew! My underwater realm is the most glorious of the world's habitats. It positively teems with life, and it's much cooler there than in that sweaty Underworld of yours!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, Nephew, supposing it's high time for the high seas to lend their might once more?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Your uncle's offering to shake things up once more, what say you, little Hades?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: No more dallying about, now, little Nephew! Time instead we really got somewhere!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Good tidings, little Hades! It is I! And I am always here to help!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Fear not, Nephew, it is I, your uncle! Come to wash away your troubles, here and now!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Just point me toward your enemies, Nephew, and they'll become sworn enemies of mine!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Let's get you out from underneath the sea, there, little Nephew!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahoy, my godly Nephew, I've arrived, so set aside your worries and let's drench the dead!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: How about we set you up here with some real water-power, little Hades?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I take it you could use some liquid courage at this time, no, little Hades?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: How about a swim, there, little Hades? A swim, that is, within the Pool of Blessings! Now, dive in!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm here, Nephew, to aid you in your time of need, with this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I heard that you could use the awesome power of the sea, Nephew!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Go on and make a splash for me, why don't you, little Hades!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: The treasures of the sea are limitless, so here! You take your pick!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: What do you say we make some waves, right, little Hades?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't let the wretched dead dampen your spirits, little Hades! Dampen theirs!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Here comes another cool, refreshing blessing for you, Nephew!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Water can even cut through solid stone, with enough time! So you keep at it, there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I know that you can do it, little Hades! Whatever it may be!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: It's darker than the bottom of the sea in there! Are you alive, Nephew?!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: The secrets of the sea can all be yours! Eventually at least, I have just three for now!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You still alive down there, Nephew? Because if so, why, this ought to keep it that way!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Must get so stuffy in that dreary place, Nephew! So why don't you cool off a bit, with this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You have a dirty job down there, Nephew, but I can help you to clean up a bit!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: All that I ask, here, little Nephew, is for you to do your best! As I would do!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahoy, and now prepare yourself! For I've a rare treat here, especially for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I am ever impressed with your will to succeed, Nephew, so here! Great blessings be with you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You've earned only the very finest of my blessings, little Hades! Why? Why not!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: If you are ever going to get out of there, only the mightiest of all my blessings will suffice!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: My favorite Nephew ought have access to my greatest blessings, should he not?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You know, Nephew, I had a positively raucous time down there, with your old father, and Persephone, was she a sight! I never thought I'd see her again! So then, we're one big happy family, at last! But you've a job to do, and we upon Olympus, we'll do our fair share!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I'll tell you, Nephew, I was quite taken aback to learn Persephone, she was your mother all along! Just disappeared up here, one day! Ran off, I figured, as she's got some mortal blood in her. But she was with your father! That rascal is my brother, after all!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: So how is crusty old Hades faring down there of late, Nephew? Fewer worries there upon his brow? That Underworld of yours all running smoothly, and all that? We'll keep on pitching in from over here. Least we can do!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Persephone, she says you're really stuck down there, born of the Underworld, something like that? Well, if you ask me, that's no kind of attitude to have! You can do anything you set your mind to, Nephew! Take it from me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: If you do ever get the opportunity to spend some time up here, Nephew, know I shall take you on a grand tour of the surface! From the depths of my seas to the height of Olympus! Sure, maybe not today, or tomorrow, or even the next aeon! But sometime, we should go!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Been nice to see my brothers getting on again, just like old times! Well, not exactly like old times, and come to think of it, there always was a bit of tension there between those two, but still! It's better than before!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Whaaaa, you think that you've a chance in hell without my help, am I to understand?! You made a big mistake there, little Hades, just you watch.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: How bold of you to throw your lot in with my relatives instead of me, given the choice, there, little Hades. But don't you ever bet against this horse!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, now, it seems to me your strength outweighs your smarts, there, Nephew, if you're prone to picking other sides than mine!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: A word of caution, little Nephew: Never turn your back against the sea. And, while you're at it, never take up sides against your greatest uncle!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Augh! I'm absolutely flabbergasted, Nephew!! I offer you the finest blessings of the earth and sea, and they're not good enough?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Apparently my crusty elder brother failed to teach you any manners, if you deign to thusly spurn my offerings! But I can teach you yet!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Betrayal, little Hades!! Of all my nephews, you should know better than this! Or perhaps I should. One of us, at least!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: That's definitely not the choice I would have made, Nephew! Because, for me to side against myself, why, that would make no sense at all!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew, what you have just done is tantamount to spitting in my face! Let me remind you, then, the ocean can spit back!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You wound me, little Hades, with your callous choice! It's fortunate I'm quite impervious to harm. But I don't think the same is true for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You know the saying not to play with fire, don't you, Nephew? You'll find the same is very much the case with water, too!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Again, you would defy me, little Hades? I'm beginning to see why your father might be very frustrated, indeed, having to deal with you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: It seems that you require yet one more gentle reminder not to scoff at chances to accept my blessings, little Hades! Now remember this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Sometimes I think, surely my nephew takes to heart my strongly worded threats about my distaste for his little acts of treachery, but no!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I could have sworn I told you never to take the power of the sea for granted, little Hades? It seems the time for words is over, then!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, I thought for certain you were well on your way out of there last time, Nephew! But, no matter, we'll just get you on another voyage to the top!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Little Nephew, why, I could have sworn you made it to the surface recently, and yet, you're all the way back there, again? Must be some sort of terrible monstrosity preventing your way out!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Good tidings, Nephew! I've learned that you have managed to get all the way to Asphodel, fine work! Now, you just keep on going!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ohh, Nephew, you've stood against the Bull of Minos, have you? Well I must apologize for any inconvenience there, because, he was a living testament to my revenge! Long story, boring really, rather sordid, too. Stay strong!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Word reaches us that you've come very far, indeed, Nephew! Striking distance from the surface! You just keep at it like that, and with our help, we'll have you out of there for sure!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: I wonder what monstrosities await you near the surface, little Hades? There's your father's terrifying hell-hound, for one thing! Ah, well, I'm sure you'll find a way to sail past whatever's in your way!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Now don't lose heart, Nephew! Because in spite of all your efforts, it is probably the case that you still have a long and painful road ahead!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, it seems to me you've had yourself a spot of lady trouble, lately, isn't that correct, Nephew? I mean the Fury down in Tartarus, of course! You going to let her keep on bossing you around?!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hah! I heard you showed that good-for-nothing Fury after all, I knew you'd handle that old crone, Nephew! And if she troubles you again, you just remind her who's in charge down there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: You've come to know your Uncle Zeus, by now, correct? Just want to let you know, good Zeus gets very busy on the regular, so you just stick with me, I've always time for you, Nephew!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, little Hades, you must know by now I've other nephews here, don't you? For instance, Ares comes to mind, the god of war! Some mighty wars have taken place at sea, is that not so?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: Indeed, they have, good Uncle Poseidon. Mortals show great ingenuity when war is concerned; it drives their sense of progress, more than anything at all. Perhaps someday they shall wage war even in Father's skies.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: The thing about me, Nephew, is I get along with everybody, here! A skill apparently that's rather rare! Take my niece Artemis, for instance! Can't ever take a simple jest, at all! You won't easily attract a mate with such a sour look about you, girl!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, and wouldn't that be such a pity, Uncle Poseidon. I wonder what could be the cause of this sour look that I perpetually have up here? Maybe Zagreus knows.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Hahaha! See exactly what I mean, Nephew?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: As you can see by now, we are a big and clever family, little Hades! My niece Athena here being the cleverest of all. You'd never know that she was childless, the way she looks after and cares for all of us!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Athena_01
dialogueLines.text: Surely my cleverness comes from your brother and yourself, Lord Uncle Poseidon. And I would only add, my feeling is we've more than enough children in this family, thus no further need for more of them, for now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: My foster-sister Goddess Demeter, despite her stern approach, she often likes to make good sport of me, Nephew! Why, here she is right now!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Demeter_01
dialogueLines.text: If you're quite finished blathering, Poseidon, our young Zagreus has more important things to do. He needs your blessings, not your point of view. Don't you, young sprout?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, little Hades, you have met my brother Zeus! He's sometimes known as king of all the gods! Although, in many ways, he's not as powerful as I! Nor anywhere as dashing. Why, I, oop--!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, Brother... you know better than to say such things about me, I should think. I know that tact does not come easily to you, though I'd be careful what you say to our good nephew, there.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Poseidon_01
dialogueLines.text: Buh, erm, anyway, as I was saying, little Hades! Brother Zeus is king of all the gods! And the most dashing, powerful, and hey, let's face it, godliest of all!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Has lovely Aphrodite put you in a trance already, Zagreus? Or might I offer you the blessing of Olympus to intensify her catastrophic power with my own?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Getting along with Ares, are you, Nephew? Heh. Would that you were my son instead of he, but no, I jest, I jest! Here, take my blessing, please!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: So my elusive Artemis has shown you favor, has she? The little scamp, she seldom shows respect to anyone, not even me! But I'll enhance her blessing nonetheless.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: My brave daughter Athena beat me to you this time, has she? No matter, with her blessing and my own, you shall be nigh unstoppable!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: My good sister Demeter already tried to poison you against me, as I understand, young man? Oh, foster-sister she prefers I say, loath as she is to accept her role as part of our great family.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You must forgive the Lady Demeter her scornfulness, Nephew, for she is still recovering after the sudden disappearance of her daughter, though it was quite some time ago the girl, poof! Just vanished. I try to lighten up the mood around it every now and then, but no, a sore spot, still!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I gather Lady Demeter's already got her frigid hold on you, certainly not the warmest member of the clan, now, is she? But do be patient with her, she's been through a lot.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: It pleases me to know, young man, that you and Dionysus have been getting on so well. He could use a level-headed friend, and you could use my blessing!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew, I have somewhat of a favor I must ask. You tell your father, if you so happen to run into him again, that his brother Zeus forgives him, and would like to reconnect, and welcome him into the family again. You tell him for me, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Hmm! You've traveled rather quickly to this point... which reminds me, I've not seen swift Hermes anywhere of late! The rascal's likely dallying about!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, must be my gleaming Thunder Signet that I transferred to you! Why, I could feel its call from all the way up here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Have you encountered Exagryph and said to it the waking-phrase I gave to you, young man? Why, I'd tell Exagryph myself! Remember, it's I see your prideful fall down from the heavens to the flames.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now that is an entirely unusual design, even for Exagryph! So then the waking-phrase has worked. That aspect's bearer, Lucifer, was it? Struck his own lord father! Tried to, anyway. A not uncommon story it would seem.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: By the way, Nephew, I hear-tell your mother Nyx is quite the catch! If you'll forgive my saying so, of course. Your father's never had much of a sensibility around companionship, though perhaps this concubine of his brought something out in him, at last!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Sure hope this works.... In the name of Hades! Olympus, this is an official message! For you, in all your splendor, Lord Uncle Zeus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: My, what is this you have for me, young man? Appears to be a message of some sort, bearing my thunder sigil! Though, there's one for everybody on Olympus? Have they as yet received their own? I must know what it says... it's from your father, who else could it be? I'd better check on this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I eagerly await learning some more about the contents of that fascinating message you had sent up here, Nephew! How mysterious, indeed. I'll be keeping an eye on all the others that come in!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Poor Demeter, young man. We still wonder what became of her fair daughter. Ran away with mortals, there, perhaps? Some of the tales, even more preposterous. Don't go believing everything you hear, and do be sensitive about the subject, hm? Demeter, she's been through quite enough.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: The Lady Demeter still prattles on about her missing girl, Zagreus. But I want you to understand something, all right? She's gone. We all have grieved. Perhaps Demeter shall finally accept what has occurred, and we can move forward, having grown stronger as a family.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Poseidon sought you out already, hm? My boastful brother gets on with Lord Hades even worse than I, so let me put a little spark into his storms for you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I suppose even down in the Underworld, you would have heard such tales of me, young man. They're all untrue, hahaha! Except the tales of my bravery. Those are completely accurate, though all too modest, in most cases, I must say.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, now that's the Aegis that I know and love! Or used to love, at least, the dear old thing! Now I quite love these shocking bolts of mine. Though I am proud you've given Aegis a good home, and bear it in my name!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: So you are son to Hades by that Nyx, the night-goddess, is that correct, Nephew...? Well I suppose she's closest to a queen as your lord father's like to find down there. I tried to match him up with some more wholesome types, but no, and here we are.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: After we learned about your plight and your existence from the goddess Nyx, all of us on Olympus rallied to assist you just as best we could. A family such as mine protects its own!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: My brothers Hades and Poseidon once fought bravely by my side, you know that, don't you, Nephew? We prevailed against the Titans and established law upon the earth. Your father then descended to the land of death, and we've not seen much of each other since.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Your father must have told you that his governance over the Underworld is due more to the weaving of the Fates than by his choice. Admittedly, he got the short end of the stick. Whereas Poseidon and myself, why, we've been doing rather well indeed.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: My brother Hades always was a lonesome man, you know. I pitied him! But I could never quite extract him from his thorny shell. Now he stews resentfully down there. You needn't bear the brunt of his frustrations.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Old Hades has continued to ignore my every effort to reach out to him, young man. Ah well, but he is obstinate, indeed. You are wise to seek your family's better half.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Is this really him? OK. In the name of Hades! Olympus! I accept this message.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Greetings there, young man! Look, your father's always been rather difficult, and he's not so much as called in quite some time. You'll have a better home where you belong, here on Olympus! And to help you on your journey, have my blessing.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
