dialogueLines.text: Lord Zeus, erm, Uncle? Please accept this offering, and all my gratitude.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Goodness, Nephew, that's an offering, indeed! I'm thankful for your piety to me, and as a show of generosity to you, in turn, I present this!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: I thank you, my Lord Uncle Zeus, for your benevolence and your thunderous might.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You honor me, young man, as well you should, for I am ruler of Olympus, am I not? Such courtesies are shown me constantly, yet I appreciate them all.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Lord Zeus, I bid you please accept my humble offering, for all you've done for me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, that is rather generous of you, and I'm grateful for it, Nephew! How good of you to make attempts at reciprocity!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: This offering is but a trifle, Uncle Zeus, for all your magnanimity.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: So fine a gift again, my dear Nephew? Would that my sons and daughters on Olympus here would show me such respect from time to time!

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: Please, Lord Uncle Zeus, accept this gift of Nectar in your honor, though it is such a pittance in comparison to all the generosity you've shown.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm very pleased to see a show of such respect and admiration for your uncle, Zagreus. You'll go quite far here on Olympus with an attitude like that! Not everyone's as mannered, nor as wise.

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: If you can hear me, mighty Uncle Zeus, I wish to make to you this simple gift, and with it send my humble wish that someday you and Father settle all your differences, and be at peace.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, most splendid of an offering, young man. And while we've yet to even meet in person, I already feel as though the two of us are close, why, closer than you must be even with your father! Oh, hahaha! Perhaps we ought go telling everybody I'm your real father, am I right?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: If you can hear me, mighty Uncle Zeus, I wish to make to you this simple gift, and with it send my humble wish that someday you and Father settle all your differences, and be at peace.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, most splendid of an offering, young man. I already feel as though the two of us are close, why, closer than you must be even with your father! Oh, hahaha! Perhaps we ought go telling everybody I'm your real father, am I right?

dialogueLines.speaker: CharProtag
dialogueLines.text: King of the Olympians, Lord Zeus! Forgive this offer of Ambrosia, for I know you have no limit of it there. But here, it is the finest gift that can be given, and even still it isn't anything compared to all you've done for me. Thank you, Uncle.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, now, Nephew, you are most generous, indeed, in showing all this deference to me. But we must keep some distance, shouldn't we? Lest all the others here, why, they would be most jealous if they caught me playing favorites! Even though you are my favorite! Presently, at least.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You fight your father's legions with Varatha, the Eternal Spear? The irony must not escape him, for he long ago stood by my side against the Titans, with that thing in hand!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: It seems the bow called Coronacht is safe and sound there in your hands, young man. I've not seen that old thing in quite some time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: That shield of yours, called Aegis, why, in fact, it's mine from long ago, young man! I've no more need of it, of course, though how you found it, you shall have to tell me once you're here!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, if it isn't the one and only Rail of Adamant in your possession, there! To strike one's enemies from afar is really the only way, I think, and it's about as good a substitute for lightning bolts as you're likely to find!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, isn't that Malphon the Twin Fists there in your possession, Zagreus? Last god I saw bedecked in those old gloves was Demeter herself, oh, way back when! She was a real fighter at the time, not just a naysayer!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: The lord and ruler of Olympus and the world, why, he needs a healthy sense of humor, no, young man? Now there's an awful lot of spoil-sports out here, can't take even a little joke, well, I know all their mothers, fie on all of them, I say! Let's joke away!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I wonder, Nephew, whether you're prepared as yet to harness the surpassing power I shall grant you now? Don't take this blessing lightly, and may you use it well.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: How about, young man, we cease with all the trifling down there and cause a real storm for once? Take now the fiercest of my powers, and you show your no-good father what you're made of!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I see the boatman of the Underworld has found the means to reach you with my blessing, Nephew. Such strange alliances we forge these days!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Why here I am, young man, in such strange circumstances I might add! Luckily the boatman Charon is much easier to get ahold of than your father!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, so then the boatman Charon came through for us after all, did he? Whatever means we have to reach you, we'll employ!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Your Charon there must drive quite a hard bargain, Zagreus, if he would keep you from your victory just for a bit of coin!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I thought that ferryman would be content to transfer souls across the River Styx, not rob you on your journey to the surface, there, Nephew!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Why you look positively dreadful, Zagreus. That place is doing you no favors, I can tell! Luckily, I'll do you favors aplenty!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You seem in dire need of some assistance, Nephew. So, of course, I dropped what I was doing and then sought you out as quickly as I could!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Zagreus, you must have left most of your lifeblood back the other way, hahahaha! Oh, I jest, I jest! But you look terrible.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: No, no one likes to die, young man! But since you seem about to any moment now, you keep your head held high, do you hear me?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, let's face it, Zagreus, you are as good as dead right now. But you'll just slosh right back out of the River Styx, and give it a good try again, won't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Remember, young man, dying is for mortals. So don't go making a habit of it, there! But if you have to do it, do it fighting, like a hero would!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Ah, very well, good show, young man! And I think I shall let you off the hook, and take you back under my wing, for now.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Commendable of you to live through that, and I suspect you shall think twice next time before so brazenly defying me, won't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, now, no need to hold such grudges any longer I suppose, but you just mind yourself around your Uncle Zeus.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Do not spurn me again like that, do you hear me, young man? I think you do, so let's put this to bed and move along.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh Nephew, but I simply can't stay wrathful toward you, much as I might try! Though, better not to tempt me, just in case.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, all right, let's call the score between us settled up for now. Just don't go spurning me again, you understand?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: All right, this is becoming unproductive, Zagreus. As you were!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Oh, I don't have the heart to keep exacting vengeance on you, Nephew.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I say, such petty squabbles. Aren't we better than this, Zagreus?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, young man, I'd say it's best we put this little slight behind us, wouldn't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Pah! All is forgiven and forgotten, Zagreus. What were we even going on about back there?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Hahaha, that is quite enough, that's quite enough, I say! You're still alive, aren't you?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: We meet again, young man! Yours isn't my affair, I know, and yet I cannot help but take an interest in your plight. Your father cast his lot; he need not take his anger out on you.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Hello, young man, and might I offer you a little taste of the heavens themselves? Though, don't go telling your old sulky father I've been spoiling you rotten!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I and all of us upon Olympus are anticipating your success, dear Nephew! Now let me see if I can't help spur you along.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Well, my nephew, you're admittedly in quite a bind down there, but what is life without its struggles, hm? You'll make it here, eventually, I'm certain.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I like the fire in you, Zagreus, and I have every confidence you'll someday clamber from the shadows there into the light!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Here on Olympus, Nephew, we take care of one another and support each other, quite unlike how it must be there in your father's grim domain. No wonder you intend to leave!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I'd ask you offer my respects to your lord father, Zagreus, but I suspect you won't have such a chance anytime soon, considering how far you'll come with my support!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Remember you've as many chances as it takes, young man, to fight your way out of the dark and join us in the splendor of Olympus!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Your grim-faced father's such a spoilsport, Nephew, the way he keeps impeding your escape. Ah, well, just keep at it, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: My greetings, young Nephew, and more importantly, my blessing and my strength be with you as you journey towards your rightful home.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Faith and courage, Zagreus, for each and every one of us upon Olympus is behind you all the way throughout this whole affair.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: What can I say, young man? You may not make your father very proud, but it is just the opposite with me! Now go, get out of there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, Nephew, how about we put both of our backs into this one, and see to it that you go farther through those depths than you have ever managed yet!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Know that many mortals ask me for my blessings constantly, and I mean all the time, young Nephew, but for you! You needn't ask at all!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Far be it from me to raise my hand against your father, dear Nephew! Although I do suppose old Hades has it coming, doesn't he.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I've every confidence in you, young man! Now you remember that, and take my blessing here, and fight your way on out of there for me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew, I want you to go and show that surly Hades everything you're made of! And, I've arranged for you a little bit of help along the way!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: How is old Hades doing, anyway, Nephew? I suspect he's every bit as prickly as ever, whereas you are nothing of the sort!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I eagerly anticipate getting to meet you face-to-face someday, dear Nephew, just as soon as you can up and out of there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Good Nephew, I return once more to lend to you my power! I'd like to see your discontented father try and stop you now!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: It is my solemn wish, dear Zagreus, that eventually we settle up our differences with your lord father. But for now, we fight!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Hail, my most honorable, beloved nephew, and I bring to you the blessing of Olympus, so that you might finally get out of there, already!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I just know you'll reach the surface here eventually, Zagreus! And I look forward to our meeting when you do!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You have my blessing now as ever there, young man.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: We'll keep you safe here from your father, Zagreus! But while you're still inside that Underworld, there's only so much we can do.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I trust you shall be getting out of there in due course, Nephew.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You've a good head on your shoulders, Zagreus, so stay positive, stay healthy, and let nothing stand between you and your goal!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I shall be watching over you, young man, though it is dark down there!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I wish you well in your continued quest, and offer my sincerest blessings, and of course my power, there, Nephew!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: May the might of Olympus guide you through the shadows, Nephew.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You've seen the sheer destructive power of the heavens! Just imagine what it's like above the surface of the earth!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't let your father get to you, young man, and climb on out from there.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Someday when we'll be resting easy on these heights, why, we'll look back at this and laugh, I'm sure of it!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Zagreus, we won't be giving up on you, so you keep at it, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I shall make the heavens themselves now aid your ascent, Nephew.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You'll watch yourself down there, won't you, young man?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: All of us, we're here for you, young man!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Please do be careful not to make your situation any worse, Nephew!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm here for you, young man, so you take heart, and more than that, take this!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: All of us believe in you, though certainly no one so much as I!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Here's something I can do to help, young man!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You just take all the time you need in terms of fighting your way out of there, young man!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, don't lose heart, young man, and we'll keep at it with you here, as well!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: As my kin, you are a born fighter, Zagreus! So put your back into it, and you climb right up!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: It shall be glorious, indeed, the day you finally burst from that oppressive den into the light!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I know you have it in you to surpass your father, Zagreus. Assuming you are anything like me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Ahh, but if it isn't my most favored nephew! Striving always toward the surface of my world. Your father cannot possibly believe he can contain you, can he?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: How fares your lovely mother? Things still good with her and Hades, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You tell your good lord father that his brother Zeus shall be always watching over you!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I trust your good lord father's treating you all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I know you're busy, Zagreus, though someday you shall have to visit us!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I'm never quite so busy that I can't make time for family, young man!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: We're all in this together, aren't we, Nephew?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I have to tell you, Zagreus, that it was wonderful to meet with you, at last! We were so pleased to learn Persephone was safe! And Nyx, why, she's as stunning as they say. Shouldn't have lied to us about your parentage, but, I know things get complicated, here, and that what's done is done!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Your dear mother Persephone is a shrewd woman, Zagreus. More than an equal to your mighty father! I'm pleased to know you've made amends with her, and taken new responsibilities within your House! Naturally, I'll continue to pitch in. And, I hope that we'll meet again, someday!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I must say, Nephew! Although it pleases me that we, here, reconnected with your father's realm... just between us, it pleases me even more that you are able to keep sticking it to him! You keep that up, all right?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Zagreus, you have a clever mother in Persephone! A very clever mother. And a lordly father! They make quite the team, that's evident! True rivals for Hera and me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: My blessing isn't good enough for you, is that the way of it, young man? How impetuous of you. Oh, I never!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: It isn't wise to go against me, Nephew, both in matters large and small. I am not known for being charitable to the insolent.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Perhaps you have defied me here in jest, young man. Though in such cases pertinent to my authority, you'll find I lack a sense of humor.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Audacity runs in our family, Zagreus, but my advice to you is that you keep it carefully suppressed in your relationship with me.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: What have I done, good Nephew, to deserve such scorn? Your lapse in judgment here is not so easy to forgive, yet easily punished.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Your father likewise turned his back on me before, Nephew, and we both know what has become of him. I'd caution you against this.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Apparently, the consequences of displeasing me have slipped your mind, young man. A harsh reminder is in order, then.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I did not restore order to this world, and claim the heavens for myself, only to be insulted by my own nephew!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, Nephew, is this all some sort of jest to you? It isn't one that I appreciate!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew, when presented with a choice to side against me or not to be such a fool, do be sure to choose the latter next time, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Don't say I didn't warn you, young man! I only wish that I could say you didn't insult me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: This is outrageous, Zagreus! Even your father would agree that actions such as that can't go unpunished.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Young man, I don't know why you would do this to me, though I trust you're going to think twice, next time!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: You overstep your bounds with me, Nephew! But I shall make you fall right back in line.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Hark, young man, for I've a vision I must share with you! A waking-phrase for Exagryph, to be precise. Please beseech the weapon thus: I see your prideful fall down from the heavens to the flames. An odd connection to a past or future bearer, apparently one who defied a god!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew, I wanted to mention, it was odd how by every account you'd come quite close to breaking free from there at last, of late... only to be abruptly cut off from our contact! I suppose having suffered some ill fate? Perhaps your realm's guardian, Cerberus, is even deadlier than reputed!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: If and when you reach the surface, Zagreus, you call upon me then and there, all right? I'll personally see to it that you'll be escorted up to Olympus, and your quest shall be complete!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: I know just how much you must want out of there, young man. And I want that as well! Heh. Good thing for you, as I get what I want around here. Ask anybody!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Young man, I know you'd like to get to know the comely Aphrodite face to face, or I don't know, you can decide once you arrive at last! He can decide, isn't that right, my Lady Aphrodite, hm?

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Aphrodite_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, I never, Lord Zeus! That sounded rather like a crass remark, from you! How shocking that the golden standard for the rest of us should have such words for me!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Nephew! By my divine authority, my oft-misunderstood son, Ares, now shall lend you a small token of his power. I'll make him helpful yet!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Ares_01
dialogueLines.text: It shall be exactly as you say, Lord Father. Your wishes are identical to mine.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, Zagreus, once you arrive, we'll have to find for you a suitable mate, won't we? Fine young man such as yourself! Normally, there's much to choose from around here, with some exceptions, of course... such as my cunning daughter, Artemis. Willfully uninclined to take a mate, at all!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Artemis_01
dialogueLines.text: Yes, Zagreus, in spite of all these perfect, chiseled prospects everywhere about, yearning to marry or embarrass me, for some reason, I prefer to spend my time mostly alone or with my nymph friends in the woods!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, look, Zagreus, here comes brave Athena, first to reach you among all my kin, in all her shrewdness. So proactive, you contacted Zagreus prior to even telling me, my dear!

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Athena_01
dialogueLines.text: Lord Father, would that I could settle even more such matters quickly and discreetly, so that only the most vital of them rise up to the level of your notice, sir. Though, I'm certain Zagreus and I are very grateful you have intervened.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Zeus_01
dialogueLines.text: Now, now, young man, whatever you have heard about good Demeter, I'm here to clear the air. She's like a sister to me, yes, but only thus. Although her Titan parents and my own met the same fate.

dialogueLines.speaker: NPC_Demeter_01
dialogueLines.text: Why, Foster-Brother Zeus! Such an unlikely bit of candor there, from you! Almost as though you felt compelled to speak the truth only whilst I'm directly within earshot.
